chapters.title: Chapter 673
chapters.body:
Chapter 673

Perhaps, this was exactly what the saying meant — one good turn deserves another. Had they only went to devour some heavenly beasts to increase their Saint Energy, only God would know how long it would take them to absorb 3,000 drops of Saint Energy. After all, the number of heavenly beasts that were at least at the Heavenly King tier and above were very, very limited, even if it was in the Heavenly Snow Mountain. It was absolutely impossible for them to simply devour them and transform as they wished.

However, the amount of energy contained in the Destruction Energy was so incredibly vast. Both Zhou Weiqing and Tian’er could clearly feel the increasing speed of the huge Saint Energy Whirlpool that was at their joined hands.

The phrase ‘as one fell, another rose up’ was the perfect one to describe them. As the Saint Energy slowly increased in amount, the amount of Destruction Energy that they could devour each time gradually grew as well. Not only that, the speed at which they devoured the energy was accelerating as well.

Right now, Zhou Weiqing and Tian’er was so absorbed in the process that they had completely entered a state of oblivion. The Heavenly Energy in their bodies were being replaced by the pure Saint Energy. Along with the nourishment from this energy, their bodies were slowly being enhanced.

The three Shangguan sister obtained various benefits as they cultivated at the same time. They too were advancing at a tremendous pace.

In the Lustre Spatial Realm, time was no longer a problem. Nobody knew how long had passed by when suddenly, Zhou Weiqing and Tian’er was startled at the same time, hastily opening their eyes.

Such a sudden awakening appalled the both of them. Glancing at each other, they were pleasantly surprised to find that Heavenly Energy no longer existed in their body, they were all completely replaced by the Saint Energy in every corner of their bodies. Not only that, the energy seemed to continue pouring into them

.

Yet, the Destruction Energy in the body of Hui Yao the dragon was only halfway devoured by them. Both of them were taken completely surprised yet struck dumb with amazement by this realization.

After all, both of them now was possessed at least 3,000 drops of Saint Energy in their bodies. Yet, in such a circumstance, the Destruction Energy was still not completely devoured. One could easily imagine how horrifying this energy was.

However, a new problem had arisen in Zhou Weiqing and Tian’er. They realized almost simultaneously that each of their bodies could no longer contain the Saint Energy.

That was right, their bodies could no longer contain it. After the Saint Energy had exceeded 3,000 drops, all they could feel was their body beginning to swell. Thought the Saint Energy was being continuously built up in their body, they began to feel a pain because of the swelling. It was apparent that this was not a good sign at all. Not only that, the Saint Energy did not even begin to show the slightest signs of it solidifying into a Saint Pill though it had reached the threshold of 3,000 drops.

“W-What happened?” Zhou Weiqing and Tian’er glanced at each other, obviously confused by this matter. The Demonic Devour was still going on and the Saint Energy was still building up in their bodies. If this continued, both of their bodies would probably be blown up by the Saint Energy. No matter how strong and tough their bodies were, it would still be feeble in the face of Saint Energy.

“Bing’er, come here,” Zhou Weiqing’s clever mind started to work at this instance as he quickly gave an instruction.

The three Shangguan sisters who were cultivating behind them opened their eyes in shock. The faith that Shangguan Bing’er had in Zhou Weiqing was absolute and incomparable. Immediately, she stepped forward and stood in front of him with a surprised and concerned look, “Fatty, what’s wrong?”

“Kiss me,” Zhou Weiqing demanded without hesitation.

Looking at the anxiousness on his face, Shangguan Bing’er decided to put aside her shyness as she knew that this time, Zhou Weiqing must have his reasons for making that demand.

She offered her lips and the two pair of lips met halfway as they kissed. In an instant, Bing’er’s petite body started to tremble sharply. At that moment, her body was rendered into a silverish, white color. The rich, flavorful Saint Energy flew into her body like a stream, slowly spreading across her entire body.

As the saying went — When a man builds up semen in his body, the body would automatically release it through a wet dream [1]. Since his own body could no longer hold it in any longer, Zhou Weiqing could not possibly let the Saint Energy go to waste, right?

He then thought of a method to offload this energy. After all, passing on the Saint Energy to the three Shangguan Sisters would definitely be a commendable act as well.

With the addition of Shangguan Bing’er now, along with the outflow of the Saint Energy, the pressure that was pressing on Zhou Weiqing and Bing’er’s bodies immediately dissipated without warning. Due to the sufficient Saint Energy in their bodies, the transformation speed of the Destruction Energy was increased to the next level higher.

Afraid that Shangguan Bing’er’s body would be affected by such a huge sudden transfusion of Saint Energy, the moment he had transfused 500 drops of Saint Energy into her, Zhou Weiqing stopped the kiss and summoned Shangguan Fei’er to step forward instead.

Shyly, Bing’er retreated to a side and Fei’er was bolder compared to her. She even put her arms around his neck as she kissed him, with it being her turn to accept the Saint Energy this time around.

When Zhou Weiqing had also transfused 500 drops of Saint Energy into her, he called out Xue’er’s name this time. Even Duo Si the dragon looked at him in a peculiar manner as it wondered to wondering to itself, “Yes, this human is nice but why does he have so many women around him?”

Compared to her two sisters, Shangguan Xue’er was much more shy and self-conscious. But, when Zhou Weiqing called for her name urgently again, along with the encouragement from both Fei’er and Bing’er, she finally stepped forward and stood before him.

The moment the two pairs of eyes connected, Xue’er lowered her head by nature when she saw his gentle gaze. With a sharp breath, she closed her eyes and just like Fei’er earlier, she awkwardly put her arms around his neck and offered her trembling lips to his.

The rich, flavorful Saint Energy began to flow again. At this moment, Shangguan Xue’er appeared to be exceptionally beautiful as a reddish blush spread across her delicate face. Though she had kissed Zhou Weiqing before but at that time, it was when they were both alone. Now, she had to kiss him in front of Tian’er and her two sisters, only God knew how much courage that she had to summon to do just that.

Her cold lips instantaneously warmed up from the Saint Energy. Without warning, Xue’er’s eyes widened in surprise as a certain shameless guy had taken this turn of event to his own advantage and inserted a tongue into her mouth during the Saint Energy’s transfusion. He even started to suck on her savory, delicate tongue without reserve.

Ah bastard! Bastard! BASTARD! Fei’er and Bing’er are still watching us! Xue’er wanted to break it off but she was afraid she would disrupt the absorption and transformation process of the Destruction Energy that Zhou Weiqing was going through. At this time, her brain had already plunged into total darkness, completely losing the ability to think. However, a touch of happiness gradually filled her heart quietly.

After knowing him for such a long time, here and now, the realization that she was finally his woman dawned on her for the very first time, ever. Since she could not avoid this feeling, she might as well enjoy it, right?

Without a doubt, the mouth-to-mouth Saint’s Energy transfusion method was clearly a delightful thing that Zhou Weiqing would never get tired of. After giving 500 drops to each of the three sisters, the whole process started again.

After receiving such a big amount of Saint Energy, the three Shangguan’s sister now felt like brand-new people. The warm Saint Energy in their bodies did not contradict their Heavenly Energy at all. Also, having this energy made them feel like their bodies were constantly changing in a subtle manner that they could not even begin to explain.

Finally, when Zhou Weiqing finished his fourth transfusion, the Destruction Energy in Hui Yao the dragon was now completely depleted. The instance he and Tian’er transformed the last drop of Destruction Energy into Saint Energy, the gigantic body of the dragon suddenly quivered ever so faintly without warning.

This, of course, was not a sign of his resurrection. Still, there were at least some signs of vitality in his body that was the result of the natural metamorphoses of the dragon clan’s powerful life.

The main reason why Tian’er believed that they could revive Hui Yao was because the dragon clan possessed a body that was the most powerful among all of the Heavenly beasts. Even after they were supposedly dead, their dragon soul would never dissipate but would gather in the form of a nucleus instead. The vitality and bloodline power in the body would not deteriorate even after a long period of time.

The silverish, white ray once again appeared on the five people standing there. After ending the devouring process, it could be said that the five of them have received an enormous gift from the entire process. Zhou Weiqing and Tian’er’s body was completely filled up by Saint Energy and the three Shangguan sisters had at least 2,000 drops each.

Aside from being surprised and excited, Zhou Weiqing was secretly gasping with admiration. What a tremendous amount of Destruction Energy that was! It had never crossed his mind that it would be able to be transformed into a total of 12,000 drops of Saint Energy. No wonder Duo Si said that this Destruction Energy was at a higher level than their Heavenly God Energy.

If it wasn’t for such a petrifying energy, how could Duo Si and her husband who was both on the Heavenly God-tier be hurt by those sneak attack?

“Finally our job is done,” Zhou Weiqing let out a long sigh of relief. Duo Si gradually opened up her wings and unlike the energetic Zhou Weiqing and the girls, she looked exceptionally tired. The colors of her orbs had obviously dimmed down in that gigantic dragon’s eyes.

When Zhou Weiqing were absorbing the Saint Energy, Duo Si was giving it all her might to control the Destruction Energy. Had it not been the speeding up of Zou Weiqing’s Demonic Devour at the final moment, she was not even sure she would be able to survive the whole ordeal. However, in order to resurrect his husband as soon as possible, she was willing to use up all her energy. For that reason, even if it was tiring for her, she still kept going on while she grit her teeth.

Noticing Duo Si’s exhaustion, Zhou Weiqing suggested, “Let’s take a break. At least for now, our chances appear to be more hopeful now.”

Duo Si nodded her head, the sadness that was in her eyes originally was now slightly lifted away. From the very beginning, her gaze had never left her husband. Slowly crawled to go near him, she silently watched the wounds on his body that were slowly healing.

That was right! Even when a dragon had already lost its life, after Zhou Weiqing and the girls had devoured the Destruction Energy in his body, his wounds had actually started to heal and it was at an unbelievably alarming speed as well. This was the horrifying recovery capability of the dragon clan. If the ground was not fully dyed with the red color of its blood, Zhou Weiqing would even suspect that the dragon would come alive any moment now.

“When can we begin to resurrect him?” Duo Si asked him and Tian’er.

“You’re too tired at the moment. We need your help too for the resurrection process. Resurrecting a dragon would require an exceptionally massive amount of Heavenly Energy. When Tian’er’s and my Heavenly Energy is no longer sufficient to proceed, we’ll need to consume your Heavenly Energy through Demonic Devour to support her Resurrection Skill. For this reason, you need to get back to your best form as soon as possible. We’ll start whenever you’re ready,” Zhou Weiqing replied.

Translator Notes:

[1] 正所谓精满自缢,既然自己的身体装不下了,这圣力总不能浪费吧 I swear! I didn’t make this up myself! Apparently, there IS a saying like this in Chinese!

chapters.title: Chapter 674
chapters.body:
Chapter 674

“Alright,” Duo Si nodded its head at Zhou Weiqing and slowly closed her dragon eyes in deep gratitude.

The three Shangguan sisters, on the other hand, were standing at one side with their faces blushing while Tian’er was smiling sweetly at one another.

Looking at the four girls, Zhou Weiqing stuttered awkwardly, “W-What are you guys looking at me for? Go and cultivate! Y-You guys need to let the Saint Energy fully integrate into your bodies after receiving such a vast amount of it!”

Shangguan Fei’er burst out laughing, “Oh? Are you feeling embarrassed right now with that thick skin of yours? Hmmph! I didn’t see that at all when you were kissing all of us just now!”

Zhou Weiqing quickly retorted, “T-That was merely for the sake of devouring the Destruction Energy, okay? I’m off to cultivate!” Right now, with him being on his own, it was clear that he would not be able to win against the four girls. Without a word, he sat down on the spot and began to cultivate.

Now that his body’s Saint Energy was already full, the Saint Nucleus Core still did not emerge as he had imagined. To Zhou Weiqing, this was a huge problem. Right now, the revolving of his Death Acupuncture Points were all being driven by the Saint Energy. Yet, he did not dare to absorb anymore Atmospheric Energy from the outside, otherwise, he would start to swell up again as he did previously. In other words, if he did not solve this problem as soon as possible, he would be unable to continue with his cultivation.

Similar to him, Tian’er was facing the same issue as well. For this reason, she proceeded to sit cross-legged on the ground and started her cultivation.

Be that as it may, there was no sign of impatience or panic in Zhou Weiqing at all with the condition of his body. After all, he could always use up the Saint Energy and make space in his body. Still, of course, this would be his last resort. Now that he had finally absorbed 3,000 drops of Saint Energy after going through such a trouble, he did not have the heart to waste them just like that.

With his Death Acupuncture Points revolving, though he did not dare to take in anymore Atmospheric Energy from the outside, he could still activate his Immortal Deity Technique.

Inside his Dantian, the originally small Saint Energy Whirlpool had now grown multiple times bigger and was now almost as large as the huge Saint Energy Whirlpool that he formed with Tian’er just now.

Zhou Weiqing tried to mobilize this Saint Energy and found no problem with it but the problem of him not being able to cultivate any further due to his body being fully filled had yet to be resolved.

He tried all kinds of methods again and again but still, he could not find a plausible solution to the problem. Slowly, he opened his eyes and turned over to look at Tian’er.

What entered his field of vision next shocked him to the core.

At this very moment, there was a thick layer of Saint Light that was coming off Tian’er’s body. The rich, flavorful Saint Energy was emphasizing her delicate body, making her look like a saintess. Even Zhou Weiqing could feel the hint of coercion from that sacred invincible atmosphere.

In an instant, he realized that Tian’er was actually deep in her cultivation process now. Not only that, the speed that she was absorbing the Atmospheric Energy was so nimble that it could only be described by the word ‘horrifying’.

“She actually found a way to cultivate? B-But how?” He was completely taken aback.

Right at this moment, all of a sudden, Zhou Weiqing could see that the Heavenly jewels on her hand started to slow down from its originally fast rotating speed. A faint shadow suddenly appeared on both her hands and slowly solidified into matter.

In an instant, he was hit with a hard realization. Fiercely slapping his thighs, he thought to himself, “That’s right! Why am I so stupid? Why didn’t this simple method cross my mind at all?!”

Zhou Weiqing really wanted to slap himself hard. How could he miss such a simple theory? He was the one who overcomplicated the entire thing. In fact, the solution to this problem was actually very, very easy.

That was right! Though the Saint Energy had already fully filled up his and Tian’er’s body, it was only in his veins, not his entire body. On top of that, even if the Saint Energy was already enough, their own cultivation level was still far from being able to solidify the Saint Nucleus Core. This was the reason why they needed to achieve a breakthrough with the Saint Energy instead of trying to cultivate or mobilize it. It was only after they had reached the upper Heavenly Zong-tier that they could have the opportunity to solidify the Saint Nucleus Core.

At the thought of this, Zhou Weiqing suddenly came to his senses like he had just been enlightened by something huge. Without wasting another second, he quickly entered his cultivation again and quietly recited his Immortal Deity Technique, activating his Saint Energy and pounded on his 29th Death Acupuncture Point.

Different techniques of cultivating the Heavenly Energy would have different breakthrough methods but it could not get any easier than Zhou Weiqing’s cultivation method. Right now, his Immortal Deity Technique was only needed to break through his Death Acupuncture Point.

Before this, during his last breakthrough, he had only used Heavenly Energy before in entering his 28th Death Acupuncture Point. He had never used the Saint Energy in the past to make this leap. After all, he did not have much Saint Energy so he was not willing to use them at all in the past. However, since there was nothing else left other than the Saint Energy in his body, he could only use this to help him with his progress in his cultivation journey.

Under Zhou Weiqing’s urge, the silverish white Saint Energy rushed straight towards the 29th Death Acupuncture Point under the guidance of the Immortal Deity Technique.

The fourth stage of the Immortal Deity Technique – The Death Acupuncture Points on the head and neck.

The first point was the Renying. It’s known as Man’s Prognosis Point which and is located 1.5 inches away from the Adam’s apple that he had successfully opened before. Right now, the point that he was aiming for was the second Death Acupuncture Point on his head and neck region –

The Wind Pool Point.

It was located on the lower border of the occipital bone in the depression between the origins of the sternocleidomastoid and trapezius muscles. These functioned as the meeting point of the gallbladder and Sanjiao Channels with the Yang Motility and Yang Linking Vessels. When it was hit, it would impact the medullary center and could cause the victim to become unconscious.

The Saint Energy continued to revolve and move around his veins. Under the attack of the Saint Energy, the veins that were originally closed was pried open bluntly one after the other. Not only that, under the creativity of this energy, it was increasingly being consolidated and broadened, leaving no scruples in attacking the Death Acupuncture.

On top of that, Zhou Weiqing also noticed that when he began to activate his Saint Energy to raid the Death Accupuncture, the energy had begun to be slowly be consumed in his bloated body. Though the consumption was low, it was at least gradually being used up in his cultivation.

Crack.

Without any hardship, the Wind Pool Point was broken just like that. What astonished Zhou Weiqing was the fact that the Saint Energy broke through the Wind Pool Point without him feeling even the slightest amount of pain, not even a little bit. On the contrary, his body felt rather light and in that instance, the Saint Energy in his body rushed out as it created a Death Acupuncture energy whirlpool at the Wind Pool Point. The situation where his power leaked out during his breakthrough when he used Heavenly Energy did not happen this time, let alone any other dangers.

“T-That’s it?” Zhou Weiqing was stunned reflecting on his success in breaking through the 29th Death Acupuncture Point. He watched the surging of the great amount of Saint Energy to the point and how it began to change his body.

Just like that, 300 drops of Saint Energy disappeared in a blink of eyes. The bloated feeling that he felt a while ago dissipated along with it.

“Wow, who knew using Saint Energy for my breakthrough was so easy?! Could it be that my Immortal Deity Technique was specially tailored to use Saint Energy?”

chapters.title: Chapter 675
chapters.body:
Chapter 675

Could it be that… His Immortal Deity Technique was tailored for the sake of Saint Energy?

What a simple, smooth breakthrough of the 29th Death Acupuncture Point! Zhou Weiqing was completely struck dumb by astonishment. After all, his breakthrough of the 28th Death Acupuncture Point that enabled him to enter the seventh jewel level just took place a short, short while ago. I’ve already broken through the 29th Death Acupuncture Point? Other than finding it to be beyond logic and above reason, there were absolutely no other words that Zhou Weiqing’s could use to describe this phenomenon.

It looked like he did not even have to store his energy if he used the Saint Energy to cultivate his Immortal Deity Technique. Even though he had not attempted it yet, he knew that he would need more Saint Energy to break through the next Death Acupuncture Point. Calming the excitement that he felt in wanting to try for the next breakthrough, he gradually ended his cultivation.

At the moment, it was apparent that he could not cultivate continuously to the next breakthrough. Although the Saint Energy in his body was more than enough, he still needed to revive Hui Yao the dragon with Tian’er later. Only God knew how much energy he would need to do that. Even if it was the majestic Saint Energy, the horrifying possibility of it being depleted in the process still exists. In order to ensure there wouldn’t be any failure in the resurrection plan, he needed to conserve the Saint Energy in his body as much as possible so that he could help support Tian’er during the resurrection. As for his own breakthrough, well, what was there to be worried of now that he had made such an astounding discovery? Since he still wanted to go to the Heavenly Snow Mountain, it would be better for him to solve this immediate problem first.

Zhou Weiqing noticed another marvelous discovery. After he used up 300 drops of Saint Energy, it was immediately replenished with Heavenly Energy. Although this Heavenly Energy was not the real Saint Energy, the essence of Saint Energy that was mixed in it was pretty rich. It was obvious that the Heavenly Energy that he had was different from the original Heavenly Energy. Because of the presence of the Saint Energy, he could vaguely feel that if he was to engage in a combat, as long as he did not directly unleash his Saint Energy to cast his techniques, the Heavenly Energy in his body would be almost inexhaustible.

Although his cultivation base was only at the Seventh Jewel, the vast amount of Saint Energy that he possessed had made him much, much stronger than his level. As for his actual combat effectiveness? Well, he himself was unable to answer the question as well.

The dragon was still resting as it would need more time to recover. Zhou Weiqing opened his eyes and called out to Tian’er softly.

Opening her eyes, she saw the hand that he stretched out towards her. Immediately, she understood his thoughts. The two of them held onto each other’s hands and once again, the huge Saint Energy Whirlpool started to swirl again.

At once, strong intense Saint Energy’s ripples spread out from their bodies. Whether it was the dragon or the three Shangguan’s sisters, their bodies trembled subtly as they bathed in the rays of the Saint Energy. Apparently, it was quite a boost to all of them.

When they were not devouring outside matter, Zhou Weiqing and Tian’er used their four great saint attributes to cultivate their Saint Energy. Last time, even if they cultivated one whole day, they could only obtain 10 drops of Saint Energy and that was if there was enough Atmospheric Energy in the air for them to use.

However, this time, after they had activated the huge Saint Energy Whirlpool, joy filled their hearts at once. It was because they had both noticed that even though the overall volume of the huge Saint Energy Whirlpool was not altered at all, it had been solidified many more times than it was previously. The Atmospheric Energy in the Lustre Spatial Realm was madly rushing in into their huge Saint Energy Whirlpool in an extremely exaggerated manner.

Although the energy influx was extremely huge, the pressure was still able to be borne by the huge Saint Energy Whirlpool. At the centre of the whirlpool, droplets of Saint Energy was slowly flowing in. Although the speed was not too fast, it was in some ways much stronger than before. At the very least, it only took 5 breaths for the second drop to regenerate after the first one was done. With such a cultivation speed, they could easily generate 100 drops of Saint Energy in a day, or perhaps more. If they could maintain this cultivation speed in the future, it would be more than enough even if they did not devour any Heavenly beast.

In order not to disturb the other’s cultivation, Zhou Weiqing whispered at Tian’er and told her about the situation of the Immortal Deity Technique cultivation.

The moment she heard his story, Tian’er was completely startled. She glanced up at Zhou Weiqing and after a moment of pondering, she whispered back, “Weiqing, I think you need to continue to cultivate. Duo Si has used up a lot of her power earlier so I think she needs at least 10 days before she could fully recover. Now that we’re able to generate the Saint Energy in such a fast speed, I’m sure it would be more than enough to support your consumption in these 10 days. You can’t simply pass up such a good opportunity! God knows how much Saint Energy we would be left with after we revive that gigantic dragon. You might as well seize this opportunity to push your cultivation base up a notch.”

Zhou Weiqing replied, “Do you sense anything different at all? Like did your cultivation speed improved or something?”

Tian’er shook her head, “Yeah, it’s apparent that my cultivation speed has improved and I could also feel that I would be able to breakthrough very soon but still, mine is not in the same class as your Immortal Deity Technique. If your technique is able to break through the rest of the Death Acupuncture Points, I’m pretty sure that you’d be able to enter the ninth jewel level in no time. At that time, you can also solidify your Saint Energy into the Saint Core Nucleus first. Now, both of our Saint Energy added up together is around 6000 drops and even if that’s not enough, I don’t think you’d be far from achieving that. We could each solidify part of our Saint Energy and help you make your breakthrough. We’re going to face more dangers in the future and in order to reach the Heavenly King level from the upper ninth jewel, your Heavenly Energy would need to go from the 36th level to the 40th level. But at that time, your Immortal Deity Technique would already have reached its maximum ninth jewel so you’d need more time to explore your other options.”

Under Tian’er’s encouragement, Zhou Weiqing finally agreed to the suggestion after thinking about it deeply. However, he would not use all of his Saint Energy up at ago. After discussing with Tian’er, he decided to cultivate and regenerate his Saint Energy at the same time in order to ensure that both of their Saint Energy would never be lower than 2000 droplets.

Without wasting any time, the second attack on his Death Acupuncture Point quickly took place again. Similar to the previous one, when Zhou Weiqing mobilized his Saint Energy to revolve according to the Immortal Deity Technique’s pathway, there was no obstacle at all, not even in his head region. Soon after, he successfully made another breakthrough at the 30th Death Acupuncture Point. This time, he had consumed 350 drops of Saint Energy. Had he not known beforehand that the droplets of Saint Energy were merged back into his body after he had used it up in his breakthrough, he would probably feel very reluctant to see the Saint Energy being used up so fast.

In just one go, the 31st Death Acupuncture Point was pried open in no time at all. At first, Zhou Weiqing wanted to stop and wait for his Saint Energy to regenerate before he started again, but he was stopped by Tian’er. Immediately, she passed 1,000 drops of Saint Energy to him and support him to continue his breakthrough on the 32nd Death Acupuncture Point, increasing his cultivation base up to the eighth jewel.

The instance the 32nd Death Acupuncture Point was broken through, all Zhou Weiqing felt was that all of the pores in his body were entirely blasted open, all of the 32 Death Acupuncture’s Chi current was speeding up its revolving speed. The huge Saint Energy Whirlpool that was created by him and Tian’er had also started to speed up, shortening the time they needed to absorb the Atmospheric Energy. They only needed 3 to 4 breaths now to generate 1 drop of Saint Energy. With such a speed, they could gather at least 100 Saint Energy in just 2 hours.

Unlike human beings, a Heavenly Jewel Master had a longer gaseous pulse, therefore their breath was much longer than a normal human being.

After he had made it into the eighth jewel level, Zhou Weiqing had already consumed up to a total of 1500 drops of Saint Energy, leaving him slightly distressed over the wastage. Fortunately, the number was equally shared by both of them so he could still accept it.

He did not continue to try and make another breakthrough. Instead, he stopped and activated the huge Saint Energy Whirlpool together with Tian’er to regenerate the Saint Energy.

They did not realize that it had been a full three months since they last entered the Lustre Spatial Realm. Before this, they had spent nearly two months just to devour the Destruction Energy alone but because of some mysterious, abstruse circumstances, both of them did realize it at all.

Day after day, time slowly passed away. In just a blink of an eye, another 10 days had gone by.

A deep dragonish grunt suddenly sounded, waking up the three Shangguan sisters who were in the midst of cultivation. When they opened their eyes, they could see that Duo Si the dragon was slowly rising up from the ground, sparkles were restored in her orbs.

It was also at this time that a whistle rang out from Zhou Weiqing’s mouth. The silverish white light that was emitted by him and Tian’er’s bodies turned brighter all of a sudden, shooting up to the sky like a silverish white light beam.

Letting go of Tian’er’s hand, under the surprised gaze of everybody else, his body suddenly floated up without warning. The silverish white light on his body gradually turned to into a brilliant gold color.

Unlike the gold color of Tian’er’s Divine Attribute, the gold that was emitted out of Zhou Weiqing’s body was filled with a sense of tyrannical and domineering power. Not only could the domineering power be sensed in his imposing manner, it had a special kind of existence like it was a whole other attribute of its own. The strong golden light did not have the slightest sense of energy but it felt like it was a matter that could occupy space instead.

Right at that moment, the golden light emitted from his body suddenly vanished without warning. What followed next was the lighting up of the 36 Death Acupuncture Points on his body, it made him look like he was decorated with stars. The golden light that vanished earlier suddenly reappeared again. All of a sudden, like a gigantic whirlwind that swept away clouds, Zhou Weiqing’s body began to devour the Atmospheric Energy in the air like a sea that could hold water from thousands of rivers.

“W-What’s happening?” Shangguan Bing’er quickly asked Tian’er in an anxious tone.

A smile crept up on Tian’er’s face, “His Immortal Deity Technique is going to be completed.”

That was right. Ten days of efforts, ten days of cultivation and Saint Energy regeneration. During the final spurt on the last Death Acupuncture Point, the Hundred Convergences Point, he actually used up more than 1,000 Saint Energy. After that, he and Tian’er worked hard to restore the Saint Energy in their bodies to the maximum as he held back the feelings of having all of his points interconnected during the last spurt. It was only until Duo Si had awakened that he let go of the suppression.

At this very moment, all the 36th Death Acupuncture Points that he had opened in his body started connecting to one another, just like a star map. That powerful and domineering golden light was a sign that Zhou Weiqing had managed to cultivate his Immortal Deity Technique to the maximum state. Unlike before, the Immortal Deity technique was no longer just a defensive and resistive mechanism for him.

chapters.title: Chapter 676
chapters.body:
Chapter 676

Shangguan Fei’er suddenly exclaimed, “Look at his wrists!”

The three Shangguan sisters quickly shifted their eyes. Gaping in astonishment, their eyes widened in shock. Nine dazzling Heavenly Jewels were appearing on Zhou Weiqing’s wrists at this moment.

This had completely gone beyond the logic that they understood. They thought to themselves, “In just 10 freaking days?! How could he possibly increase his level from the seventh to the ninth jewel in such a short time? He’s not even 22 years old yet for f*cks sake!” It was not that there was nobody who had managed to reach the Upper level of Heavenly Zong before 30 years old but it was extremely rare! From the looks of Zhou Weiqing’s current situation, it was very likely that he would be able to reach the Heavenly King level before he turned 30.

The metallic light drew inwards all of a sudden, creating a series of strange changes on his body without warning. Like a golden statue descending from the sky, Zhou Weiqing landed on the ground lightly. All the domineering energy was absorbed back into his body, vanishing without a trace. At once, everything seemed to return to normal. Be that as it may, the four girls who were familiar with him could feel that the man in front of them was completely different from the man they knew.

Before this, his looks could only be considered presentable, definitely not handsome. But now, there was a touch of wild and rugged charm about him. Radiant light sparkled from his eyes, as sharp as a treasured sword, giving off a feeling of a destructive artifact that would destroy his enemies anytime he liked.

What was even more shocking was the fact that in just a short amount of time, all the Atmospheric Energy from at least several hundred square meters away was completely absorbed by him. Currently, the Atmospheric Energy from the outside world was flowing towards the now empty region, resulting in a massive energy ripple that left a deep impression on everybody.

The Ninth Jewel, Upper Level Heavenly Zong. To most Heavenly Jewel Masters, this was probably the highest level that they could achieve in their entire lives. Zhou Weiqing had managed to achieve such a feat in just a short amount of time. Currently, he possessed a massive amount of Heavenly Energy and by the time he was equipped with a fitting Ringless Ground Purging Set, his power would no doubt be elevated a few times higher. Then, if by chance, he came face to face with someone on the Heavenly King tier, there would still a possibility of him winning the battle. “H-How is this possible?” Shangguan Xue’er muttered to herself as she stared at Zhou Weiqing skeptically.

As the heir to the Heaven’s Expanse Palace, she had known all along that she was much more outstanding than the other Heavenly Jewel Masters who were the same age as her. However, right now, looking at Zhou Weiqing who had already mastered nine jewels, she knew that in this instance, she was no longer in the same league as him.

After a short period of surprise, Xue’er was able to piece the puzzle together. Other than the Saint Energy, what other things out there could have such a remarkable effect? However, the three Shangguan sisters were not able to cultivate the Saint Energy. Even Xue’er felt slightly surprised looking at Zhou Weiqing who had grown so strong. However, she did not feel the slightest bit of jealousy nor did she feel the desire to contend for the upper hand at all. Instead, she felt very happy for him.

She was taken aback by her feelings, she thought to herself, “C-Could it be that I’ve acknowledged the fact that I’m his? And I’m totally okay with being his sidekick?” Looking at her own two sisters and Tian’er, Xue’er sighed helplessly, “He is such a playboy!”

Lowering his head to look at his own body, Zhou Weiqing could feel that his entire body was filled with an energy that was about to explode at any given time. What was even more strange was the fact that there were some changes in the color of his Saint Energy. The originally silverish white color now had a touch of gold in it like a layer of film coating the Saint Energy.

The Saint Energy was the highest level energy that had ever existed. Seeing the layer of gold that was still rich in color and not diffused by the Saint Energy, it must have meant that the layer of energy must be at an equally high level as well.

That was the effect of the Immortal Deity Technique after it was fully completed. Even Zhou Weiqing had no idea what it was but he could clearly feel the aura of tyranny that it possessed.

Zhou Weiqing was not the first person to cultivate the Immortal Deity Technique. However, he was definitely the first to complete its entire cultivation, opening up all 36 major Death Cultivation Points successfully.

When the Saint Energy was revolving around his body, it could already self-coordinate and after the whirlwind-like devour earlier, he noticed that the mini Saint Energy Whirlpool in his body had already vanished without a trace, leaving only the whirlpools that were activated by the 36 major Death Acupuncture Points. Be that as it may, the whirlpools had all completely transformed into the purest Saint Energy. In the swirls of the whirlpools, the Saint Energy had started to circulate in his body. In other words, he no longer had to worry about his Saint Energy being depleted and not recovering at all.

He had completely transformed his Heavenly Energy into Saint Energy with the Immortal Deity Technique and from now on, he would only possess Saint Energy in his body, there would be no more of Heavenly Energy.

Perhaps it was because that transformation that the Heavenly Jewels on Zhou Weiqing’s wrists began to show peculiar changes. The Ice Jade Physical Jewel on his right hand had completely turned into silverish white in color, the color of the Saint Energy, while the Alexandrite Cat’s Eye Gem Elemental Jewel had an additional layer of golden luster on the outside.

Even though Zhou Weiqing had no idea what level he was currently at, there was one thing that he was sure about. He no longer felt the immense pressure that he first felt when he was facing Duo Si the dragon.

For the sake of cultivating the Immortal Deity Technique, he had been through a lot of hardship for it. He had finally, finally cultivated the technique to its highest level. Even if he had no idea how or where he was going to proceed next on the cultivation path, at the very least, he had completely mastered the Immortal Deity Technique. The pain and worries that he once had to endure for the sake of this cultivation were gone with the wind. He could not help but whistle loudly again, expressing the great joy and satisfaction in his heart. He felt truly at ease and pleased.

“Congratulations, young man. Even I cannot see your true ability now,” Astonishment filled Duo Si’s eyes that also had a hint of joy in them. Without a doubt, Zhou Weiqing’s breakthrough was absolutely good news for her. The chances of reviving her husband was bound to be much higher now.

“Let us start,” Looking at Duo Si’s hopeful eyes, he nodded his head at the dragon. After such a long time here, everything was finally ready. It was time to resurrect Hui Yao the dragon.

Staring at Zhou Weiqing, Tian’er’s heart was filled with pride. Despite the fact that she was only at the Seventh Jewel stage, her man had become so powerful and strong. Somehow, she was much happier for him than her elevating her cultivation base herself. Furthermore, she knew that even her own father would never be able to achieve Zhou Weiqing’s cultivation base when he was at Zhou Weiqing’s age.

Zhou Weiqing pulled Tian’er’s hand and walked towards Hui Yao again before telling Duo Si, “Duo Si, please stay close to me. If Tian’er doesn’t have enough power to finish the process, I would need to borrow your power.”

Duo Si stepped forward and immediately, it reached their side in just a single huge stride. Again, it bent down and said, “Thank you so much for your help. As long as my husband is resurrected, I’m willing to do anything for it. You can use my strength as you like.”

While she spoke, she lifted her dragon claws towards Zhou Weiqing and at that moment, its heart was filled with deep anxiety. As the saying went – higher expectations will lead to greater disappointments. It did not know whether it would lose its mind if the resurrection somehow did not go as well as it had hoped.

Zhou Weiqing consoled the dragon earnestly, “Don’t worry, Duo Si. No matter what, we will do our best to help you resurrect Hui Yao. Who knows, perhaps we can resurrect him without even using your power at all. Right now, I’ve complete confidence that Hui Yao will stand in front of you once again.

It was not just an empty promise. The Saint Energy in his body was finally able to regenerate on its own, which meant that he could deliver a great deal of Saint Energy to Tian’er during the resurrection process. A Resurrection Skill that had sufficient Saint Energy would enhance the probability of success by manifold.

Zhou Weiqing nodded towards Tian’er, “Let’s do it!”

Just from the thoughts in their mind, the huge Saint Energy Whirlpool that was being led by him activated again. Currently, Zhou Weiqing could feel that he was completely different from before. Like a deep ocean, the huge whirlpool that he led seemed to be boundless with no end.

A dark golden light lit up, and the God Vanquishing Heavenly Spirit suit appeared on Tian’er’s body. Under the shrine of the Saint Energy, her divine aura was immediately enveloped by a layer of golden divine luster.

Holding her God Spirit Staff up high, she chanted a series of incantations. It was a language that Zhou Weiqing and the three Shangguan sisters could not understand. However, nobody realized that Duo Si actually understood the language of this ancient incantation. At present, the technique that was needed to use the incantation had gone extinct. Feeling the divine aura that was beginning to grow in power coming from Tian’er’s body, Duo Si became even more hopeful than before.

Slowly, the Heavenly Skill Image of the Divine Heavenly Spirit Tiger appeared behind Tian’er. In just a blink of an eye, the shadow solidified into a real solid matter, looking exceptionally vivid and stunning. With a loud roar, its gigantic body leaped down abruptly, entering her body from the behind.

At once, bright glittering golden luster erupted from her body. That rich, flavorful divine luster even enveloped Zhou Weiqing body. The rich Heavenly Energy’s ripples began to climb steadily until it reached the peak. Tiger tattoos began to form on Tian’er’s delicate skin as well. Still, the tattoo was different from the one that Zhou Weiqing had during his Demonic Change last time. The tiger tattoo on her body was more like an accessory, giving her an aura of ruggedness and wildness to her originally stunning body.

In stark contrast to the divine golden luster that erupted from her entire being, Tian’er’s eyes turned into a shade of deep purple. Purple lights could be seen shooting out from her eyes, carrying with it a strong and powerful mental ripple.

chapters.title: Chapter 677
chapters.body:
Chapter 677

For those from the Divine Heavenly Spirit Tiger bloodline, casting the Resurrection Skill was a huge burden to the user, it would never be completed without the Spirit Saint Attribute. Even if it was the Mountain Lord of the Snow Mountain who cast this technique, caution still had to be observed. Not only that, the amount of energy used in the process would differ based on the target of resurrection. After all, resurrecting a mouse and a dragon would, of course, consume a different amount of energy.

Her right hand that was holding the God Spirit Staff gradually started to move around. Lines were drawn in the sky, sketching complex golden symbols that solidified into golden lights one after another in the air.

After the symbols were fully drawn, they floated directly up to the sky and hovered above Hui Yao’s body. Every time there was an addition of a new symbol, a new ray of golden light would emit from the symbol as it entered Hui Yao’s body.

Right now, Zhou Weiqing who was sustaining the huge Saint Energy Whirlpool with Tian’er did not feel anything yet. So far, all of the energy that Tian’er used was her own Heavenly Energy, not the Saint Energy. After all, Tian’er’s Saint Energy had not reached the stage where it could regenerate by itself. For that reason, she chose to use Heavenly Energy first to cast her technique.

The time it took to activate the Resurrection Skill was a lot longer than they had expected. It had taken them 2 hours just for the preparation. When the 108th golden symbol emerged from thin air, all the symbols suddenly came together to form a gigantic golden halo in the air.

Right at that moment, Tian’er paused for a moment before casting a glance at Zhou Weiqing. He instantly started to feel nervous. He knew that from this point onwards, the real resurrection process was about to take place. Tian’er was finally done with all the preparatory work.

Whoosh!

The 108 golden symbols that were hovering on top of Hui Yao seemed to have activated on their own simultaneously. Without warning, they dropped from the sky and entered Hui Yao’s body.

All of a sudden, the Atmospheric Energy in the air began to ripple rapidly. A bright golden beam suddenly erupted from the God Spirit Staff on Tian’er’s hand, piercing its way through the clouds up to the sky.

At that instance, the entire Lustre Spatial Realm quaked because of the rising golden beam. In a blink of an eye, the beam was infused into the center of the 108 golden symbols.

At that moment, Zhou Weiqing could feel the Heavenly Energy in Tian’er pouring out in torrents from her body into the God Spirit Staff that she was holding.

A layer of golden luster slowly began to form a combination of the 108 golden symbols before enveloping the entire body of Hui Yao the dragon. The originally red color of its body now had a shine of brilliant gold.

The Resurrection Skill was a technique that countervailed the creator of heaven and earth. Every time the technique was activated, those who witnessed the technique would receive a different enlightening in their hearts.

Slowly closing his eyes, Zhou Weiqing activated his Immortal Deity Technique, the golden whirlpool from before appeared once again. Actually, it was not a real whirlpool but when his body turned golden in color, the Atmospheric Energy would be sucked in by him in a horrifyingly rapid speed that looked like a whirlpool was being activated on his body. Even the speed of Tian’er’s God Spirit Staff absorbing the Atmospheric Energy was far slower than him.

Not to say that the God Spirit Staff was not powerful but it was just that Zhou Weiqing’s Immortal Deity Technique was far too compelling. Not only that, his cultivation base was also at a much higher level compared to Tian’er.

The golden beam that was shooting out of the God Spirit Staff started to have a hint of silverish white color in it. In just such a short amount of time, Tian’er’s Heavenly Energy had been completely depleted and at the moment, the energy that she was unleashing was the Saint Energy. With the Saint Energy joining in the mix, Tian’er’s face finally eased off a little. After the Saint Energy was unleashed into the technique, the energy consumption rate dropped drastically, a far cry from earlier when she was using her Heavenly Energy.

Duo Si was looking at them nervously at the side. Its claw remained unmoved in front of Zhou Weiqing, just in case he needed to use it; the other dragon claw had long dug into the hard rock on the ground, showing how nervous it was, watching the scene that was unfolding in front of its eyes.

The three Shangguan sisters who were standing behind were so nervous that they did not even dare to breathe out loud. The most nervous of all was none other than Shangguan Xue’er. After all, the resurrection of the dragon was related to the safety of the entire Lustre Spacial Realm which meant it was also related to the safety of the millions of commoners residing in Zhongtian City. How could she possibly not feel nervous about it?

The golden light that fell upon Hui Yao continually seeped into its body. Like a gigantic sponge, its body kept absorbing the massive amount of divine energy.

Between Tian’er and him, Zhou Weiqing was the one that felt more tired. Under his Immortal Deity Technique, the Atmospheric Energy was constantly being absorbed and transformed by him into Saint Energy before it was being passed on to Tian’er. Like a converter, she would convert the Saint Energy that she received from him into Divine Energy before inserting it into the Resurrection Skill.

Currently, a faint smile could be seen playing on Tian’er’s mouth. She did not expect that using the Saint Energy to cast this technique would have a far slower consumption speed. No doubt, she had faith that she would definitely be able to complete the technique. However, whether Hui Yao would be resurrected or not was a different story. That would have to depend on God’s will.

Just like that, a day had passed. Zhou Weiqing’s face appeared to be slightly paler than usual. Although he could regenerate the Saint Energy in his own body now, it still could not withstand the prolonged consumption of the Resurrection Skill. Being able to keep it up for one whole day showed how tough he was, although he had already strained himself to the limit. Perhaps, not even a Heavenly King tier person could endure it.

All of a sudden, Zhou Weiqing opened his eyes and looked at Duo Si.

From the very start, Duo Si had never moved its eyes away from Hui Yao. As a couple, it had the most profound perception towards its husband. Duo Si could clearly feel that under the Resurrection Skill, its husband’s vitality was beginning to be restored and now, finally, a weak heartbeat could be heard and the heartbeat was getting stronger and stronger with every passing second.

All of a sudden, Duo Si’s body quivered without warning. Quickly turning its head over to look at Zhou Weiqing, it saw that his palm that was casting the Demonic Devour had made contact with its claw.

Duo Si nodded its head at him as it unleashed its horrifying Heavenly God tier Heavenly Energy, letting Zhou Weiqing access the power that it had.

The fact that he was able to hold out for one whole day was more than enough to leave a great impression in Duo Si’s mind. It could clearly sense the petrifying Heavenly Energy consumption speed of the Resurrection Skill and this man was actually able to persist for so long? Even Duo Si, who was at the Heavenly God-tier, was alarmed by his ability.

Once the Demonic Devour was activated, relief could be seen on Zhou Weiqing’s face. With the completion of the Immortal Deity Technique, all 36 major Death Acupuncture Points and meridians were much tougher than ordinary people by several times. For that reason, the Demonic Devour was able to transform the Saint Energy without any difficulties as well.

Before, Zhou Weiqing had tried to devour the Heavenly Energy of Heavenly King beasts but compared to Duo Si, those beasts were like ants to Duo Si’s elephant. The pure Fire Attribute Heavenly Energy in Duo Si’s body was like a vast ocean. Although it could not be compared to the Heavenly Energy at all, the amount that it possessed was extremely vast, so vast that it stretched far off into the distance and out of sight. At the moment, Zhou Weiqing’s devouring speed could be considered as extremely speedy but somehow, it did not seem to affect Duo Si at all.

With such an ‘insurance’ by his side, Zhou Weiqing immediately increased the Saint Energy output that he passed on to Tian’er. Before this, she had told him that after the Resurrection Spell was cast, the shorter the completion time, the greater the chances of resurrecting the dragon would be. Now that there was no need to worry about the depletion of Saint Energy anymore, he, of course, sped up the process without any hesitation.

Gradually, strange changes began to appear on Hui Yao’s body. The gigantic body that was rendered in gold by the Divine halo slowly had golden stars emerging on the skin. Hints of vitality started to throb from its gigantic body.

It meant that the Resurrection Skill had finally completed the process of reviving the body’s vitality. What was left now was the awakening of its soul. Only when the soul and body completely combine that the Resurrection process could be called a success.

It was also for this reason that generally, the Resurrection technique would have to be performed within 2 hours after the victim’s death. It was because during this time, the soul had not fully dissipated yet. But of course, dragons had Nucleus Core that helped converge its soul so there was no need to worry about the soul dissipating after its death. However, there had never been any precedent for resurrecting a dragon in the history of Divine Heavenly Spirit Tiger, nobody knew whether they would succeed or not.

Tian’er’s face turned serious at once. The God Spirit Staff in her hand drew much more complex golden lines compared to the ones earlier. With a shout, the lines suddenly gleamed brightly before it was imprinted on the dragon’s forehead.

In an instant, Zhou Weiqing could feel that half of his Saint Energy was being sucked out by Tian’er. The moment the golden lines touched the dragon’s forehead, the gigantic head rose up without warning. Between the dragon’s orbs on the central skull position, a blinding golden light suddenly burst out.

At that moment, the horrifying energy ripples trembled violently, releasing a sense of tyrannical pressure that forced Zhou Weiqing and the girls to retreat hastily from their positions.

Quickly, Duo Si cast a red light shade, enveloping the five of them in that light. Its eyes had never been so bright as it stared in a trance at its husband’s lifted head. The claws that Zhou Weiqing was holding on to was trembling uncontrollably. Now that the Resurrection had reached its final stage, Duo Si’s heart was filled with anxiety.

Tian’er pointed the God Spirit Staff outwards. Her body began to tremble slightly, too. It was apparent that the amount of Saint Energy that she could bear had already reached its limit.

Another golden symbol was drawn on the sky. Tian’er called forth all her energy and at once, the golden symbol was imprinted on Hui Yao’s forehead once again.

The bright dazzling golden light was so blinding that none of them could open their eyes. All of a sudden, the golden light vanished as it merged with Hui Yao’s body. Promptly, its gigantic head began to lift up high.

Just as Duo Si was about to cheer out loud and rejoice, Hui Yao’s gigantic head suddenly fell and slammed on the ground fiercely without warning.

chapters.title: Chapter 678
chapters.body:
Chapter 678

Wham!

The moment Hui Yao’s gigantic head smashed fiercely on the ground, Duo Si’s heart was almost smashed into pieces as well. Everybody’s heart immediately sank. Hui Yao’s gigantic body seemed to have turned into a gigantic dragon corpse once again.

“Noooooo…” Duo Si uttered a heartrending cry as she rushed forward. Opening up her wings, she hugged Hui Yao’s head in her arms as devastating cries filled the air. Her head was lifted up high as tears of pain dripped down from her eyes.

Just one step short of success, her hopes crumbled to dust. Duo Si’s originally agonized heart could no longer withstand such a heavy blow.

With a pale face, Tian’er slumped into Zhou Weiqing’s arms weakly. Her eyes were still staring unblinkingly at Hui Yao’s body.

Lowering her head, Duo Si cast a glance at Hui Yao before looking at Zhou Weiqing and Tian’er, the tears in her eyes had suddenly stopped flowing, “Humans, I’ve said before, in any case, I still want to thank you all. I no longer have the strength to save our children so please, I beg you, please save my children once you leave this place. I’ll go with Hui Yao very soon and this Lustre Spatial Realm will not be destroyed. Without him, I really can’t live anymore.”

Her gaze had become very gentle. After waiting for so many days, everything still failed on the eve of success. It had completely shattered the last ounce of hope in her heart. Right now, all she wanted was to go with her husband even if it meant that she would have to go to another world.

The three Shangguan sisters were already choking with tears. Looking at the tragic scene of the pair of dragon spouses, they were also immersed in deep sadness.

Creases crept up between Zhou Weiqing’s brows. He could not say anything that would stop Duo Si from killing herself. This was a female that was willing to die for love and for the sake of her husband. On top of that, she was a powerful dragon for God’s sake. It was absolutely impossible for him to stop her. Even if he managed to stop her this time, it did not mean that she would not try to seek for death again the next time.

Duo Si slowly closed her gigantic eyes. The originally strong vitality in her almost instantly dimmed down. She was intentionally shutting her heart down. Once her heart was completely shut down, she would lose her life. To kill a dragon, one would have to pay a terrible and painful price but for a dragon to take its own life, was actually a very simple matter.

Whether it was Zhou Weiqing or the three Shangguan sisters, right now, their eyes were all filled with heartbreaking sadness. Such a powerful being was ending its life in such a way. How could they possibly not feel sad over the loss?

“… Duo Si, d-dont.” Without warning, a low and weak voice rumbled.

The moment the voice sounded out, Duo Si’s rapidly deteriorating vitality became stable almost instantly. Zhou Weiqing and the girls’ eyes were widened in surprise. Each of their gazes landed on the gigantic body. W-What was that? What had just happened?

All of a sudden, an enormous terrifying tyrannical aura suddenly erupted out of Hui Yao’s body. Like an erupting volcano, a shade of eye-catching red light suddenly broke free from all constraint as massive energy gushed out into the air. The rich and terrifying Atmospheric Energy dyed everything within the proximity into red all at once.

Duo Si’s eyes that were originally closed flickered open immediately as she lowered her head to look at her husband.

Hui Yao’s body that was lying on the ground gradually began to move. Even though the speed was slow, it was stable and powerful. First, he lifted up his proud head as his gigantic body followed suit. Slowly, he finally stood up on his own.

The enormous dragon’s eyes slowly opened, his huge thick wings unfurled and wrapped Duo Si in his embrace. A strong sense of vitality quickly filled the air. At once, the petrifying dragon aura shot out of his body, piercing through the clouds up to the sky.

Yes, he was back! Hui Yao the dragon who once controlled the Lustre Spatial Realm was back.

A strange peculiar energy radiated from the dragon’s body as it transformed into five red halos. Instantly, the halos enveloped Zhou Weiqing, Tian’er, and the three Shangguan sisters.

To their surprise, the five of them could feel a wave of strange energy fluctuating and entering their brain from the point between their brows. In the next moment, their brains immediately went blank.

There were no changes in their strength and the Heavenly Energy in their bodies but at this very moment, their mental energies seemed to be bursting out almost infinitely.

Hui Yao’s gaze landed on his wife and the moment their eyes met, their gazes never left each other again.

Duo Si took the opportunity to strengthen her vitality again. Her claws clutched tightly at her husband, it was so, so tight as if she was afraid of letting go. She was extremely scared, scared that all of it was just an illusion. However, feeling the dragon aura in Hui Yao’s body that was getting more powerful with every passing second, she knew that her husband had finally, FINALLY, returned to her side.

At that moment, the pair of dragons only had one thought in their minds, “How nice it is to be able to live.” Even if they had already lived for tens of thousands of years, at this moment, they still found life to be a precious thing.

The red halos gradually disappeared from the five humans. Their eyes had once again regained their lights as they looked at each other in surprise. Their mental energies and soul energies seemed to have been elevated to another level. Zhou Weiqing who was already at the Ninth Jewel level could vaguely feel that in those short moment of ascension, his mental energy had risen to the Heavenly King level. Without a doubt, it was a great advantage for his next cultivation. It would be extremely useful in helping him to break through the Heavenly King tier and solidify the Saint Nucleus Core.

With a powerful soul energy, along with the energy in his veins, he was no longer daunted by the pressure of facing a Heavenly King-tier opponent.

This was the repayment from Hui Yao. He had used the most primitive force of his dragon clan to help elevate the soul energy of the five humans even though such a feat would greatly hurt his primordial qi.

Now that his vitality was restored, Hui Yao the dragon was completely resurrected. Tian’er’s Resurrection technique was a great success after all. Not just that, the Saint Energy would be useful to him, too. Of course, what was even more important was the fact that he could finally see his wife again.

“Thank you, humans. Thank you for saving my life,” Hui Yao’s gaze finally moved away from his wife and landed on Zhou Weiqing and the girls. Deep gratitude could be seen from both of the dragons’ eyes. Although they did not say much, the raw emotions in their eyes said plenty.

Zhou Weiqing chuckled lightly, “You don’t have to thank us. We just hope that the both of you will continue to protect this Lustre Spatial Realm instead of destroying it. That would be the greatest way to thank us.”

Hui Yao studied Zhou Weiqing. Just as Duo Si nodded her head at his side, he suddenly shook his head and growled in a low voice, “I’m afraid I won’t be able to do that.”

The moment they heard his words, Zhou Weiqing, and the girls were taken completely by surprise. Shocked, they stared confusedly at Hui Yao. From their point of views, they just saved his life for f*ck sake! Why the hell would he not agree to such a simple condition?

Hui Yao continued to stare at Zhou Weiqing. It was apparent from his eyes that he was not willing to compromise on the issue at all, “My children have been abducted! For the sake of my children, I’ll have to destroy the Lustre Spatial Realm. Only after I leave this place that I can rescue them. Even if you are the one who saved my life, you cannot stop me from rescuing my children. The most I can do is to let you take my life after I rescue my children.”

Zhou Weiqing was instantly placed in a difficult situation, he could not say anything to stop Hui Yao at all. After all, as a father, how could he possibly live with the fact that his children have just been abducted? If Zhou Weiqing was in his shoes, he would probably do the same thing.

Smiling awkwardly, Zhou Weiqing asked, “Is there any other way? Perhaps, we can rescue your children on your behalf?”

Hui Yao stared at Zhou Weiqing with his flashing red eyes. Instantly, Zhou Weiqing felt as if he was being x-rayed. A faint golden layer emerged out of thin air as it enveloped his body, as if the layer could sense that he was being threatened.

All of a sudden, Hui Yao asked in shock, “T-This is the energy that saved me? Wha… What attribute is it?”

Zhou Weiqing decided to tell the truth, “This is the Saint Energy. It’s an energy that is refined from the Divine, Time, Spirit and Evil attributes.”

At once, a light gleamed in the dragon’s orbs, “Saint Energy? It’s actually the energy that’s formed from the solidification of the four Great Saint Attributes? How is this possible? You’re only a mere human! W-Wait… Perhaps, it is actually possible…”

Zhou Weiqing was a little confused by his words, “Sir, as long as you don’t destroy the Lustre Spacial Realm, we will definitely give all our might to do whatever you want. Maybe I’m not strong enough at the moment but once I’ve succeeded in solidifying my Saint Core Nucleus, I definitely would be able to fight to the end even if my opponent is a Heavenly Emperor tier master. Please let us humans solve the dispute among humans ourselves. I promise that I will do my best to save your children.”

Nodding his head, Hui Yao’s eyes twinkled, “With the strength that you have right now, it’s far from enough. Even I do not have the confidence to say that I can successfully save my children. That energy is just too horrifying! It’s as if it came fro… from…”

Zhou Weiqing was surprised, “From where?”

After a moment of silence, Hui Yao replied, “From the Netherworld.”

Taken aback, Zhou Weiqing asked, “… N-Netherworld? What’s that?”

chapters.title: Chapter 679
chapters.body:
Chapter 679

Hui Yao let out a long sigh before he said, “You’re my savior, I don’t see any reason to hide this from you. Actually, the Netherworld is a place that doesn’t exist in our world. You can think of it as a place that exists like the Luster Spatial Realm, a parallel space. However, that place is much more terrifying than the Luster Spatial Realm. There’re many Nether creatures over there. There’s no light in the Netherworld but only bloodlust and bloodshed. To put it simply, in the Netherworld, any ordinary, run-of-the-mill Nether creature is much stronger than a Sixth Jewel-tier Heavenly Jewel Master. If the Netherworld is connected to your human world, the human world will perish in no time.”

After listening to Hui Yao’s descriptions, Zhou Weiqing was stunned by his words. This was something that he had never heard of before. Disbelief began to form in his eyes.

Of course, Hui Yao knew what he was thinking. In a composed tone, he continued, “There’s no need for you to doubt me. The Netherworld really does exist. The Luster Spatial Realm was built because of the Netherworld. A hundred thousand years ago, the Netherworld almost opened up a channel that could connect to the human world. At that time, there were many powerful dragons like us in your human world and under their combined effort, they managed to seal the passage completely before they specially assigned people to guard it. Ever since then, the dragon clan has been responsible for guarding it. This is also why we rarely show ourselves in the human world. In the past, the dragon clan’s head was responsible for guarding the Netherworld’s passage. In order to guard it, the dragon clan paid a hefty price. Because of the influence of the Netherworld energy, our conceiving rate is very low. It’s also because of this that our ancestors decided to build this Luster Spatial Realm and sent Duo Si and me here when we were still young, with the objective of continuing the dragon lineage over here.”

Zhou Weiqing gasped. If what Hui Yao said was true and the person who kidnapped their children was somebody from the Netherworld, it meant that the human world was in danger.

Hui Yao continued, “There’s a high possibility that the energy that previously caused the spatial tear came from the Netherworld. After all, only the Nether Lord possesses that kind of power that’s able to temporary cause a spatial tear. Even though he and the other Nether creatures can’t enter our world, he can send his delegates here. It was exactly them who took my children away. I’ve no idea what they planned to do but I’m certain that it wouldn’t be good for you human beings, too. Your cultivation base is considered quite good among the humans, especially that strange Saint Energy of yours. However, you’re still far too weak compared to the delegates from the Netherworld.”

After mulling over it, Zhou Weiqing queried, “Who or what exactly are the Netherworld delegates that you speak of?”

Hui Yao replied without any hesitation, “Humans! Among you humans, there are some who thirst for power. Iann order to pursue this power, these people are willing to use unscrupulous tactics. It’s exactly because of this that they’re lured by the Nether Lord to become his servants. The Nether Lord would give them power so that they c help him carry out his plans. As long as there’s an opening, they’ll help the Nether Lord weaken the seal of the passage.”

A gleam flashed in Zhou Weiqing’s eyes, “Then, this means that the human world is in danger! Are you certain that the Nether creatures won’t be able to cross over to our world?”

Hui Yao nodded his head, “As long as the seal is not destroyed, even the extremely powerful Nether Lord will not be able to enter the human world. All he can do is create a spatial tear and send energy ripples over. On top of that, he’ll have to pay a hefty price every time he does so. Therefore, if you want to stop the Nether passage from opening, you’ll have to deal with those filths in the human world first. Truth be told, me and Duo Si leaving the Luster Spatial Realm is not entirely a bad thing for you human beings. We have a keen perception towards the Nether aura. As the descendant of a Dragon Emperor, the Dragon Emperor’s energy in my blood would be able to lead me to those people.”

Zhou Weiqing smiled awkwardly, “However, if you leave, it would deal a devastating blow to the entire human world. Perhaps, you don’t know but there is a palace built on the Heavenly Jewel Island in this Luster Spatial Realm. It’s called the Heaven’s Expanse Palace. Not only that, under this Heavenly Jewel Island, there is a gigantic city that is inhabited by more than ten million people. If the Luster Spatial Realm is destroyed, then, the biggest city in the human world would be gone as well. This is why we are fighting to stop you from leaving.”

Closing his eyes slowly, Hui Yao contemplated for a moment before replying calmly, “Actually, there might be another way. Right now, our children have not hatched so no matter what those people planned to do with our children, they will have to wait till they are fully hatched. However, without our energy, no matter what methods they use to speed up the hatching, it will take at least five years before it can happen. Six months have passed since that incident, so we still stand a chance if you can get us out of here within three years.”

Shangguan Xue’er who was standing by the side suddenly interjected, “We will do our best to meet your request. Do you have any methods that you can use to leave this place without destroying the Luster Spatial Realm?”

Hui Yao nodded his head, “Other than destroying the realm, there is another way. Teleportation. Forcefully tear open the space and teleport the two of us out of here, just like how they tore open the space and sent the humans in last time.

Zhou Weiqing drew a long breath, “But that can only be done if we are extremely powerful! I’m afraid that even a Heavenly God tier person would not be able to do that!”

Hui Yao replied, “Being powerful is one thing. If you can find the Spatial Teleportation Stone, you’ll be able to save a lot of energy. With the amount of Saint Energy that you possess right now, it’s more than enough for you to activate the stone. I’ll give you a coordinate and you only need to carve the coordinate on the stone. As for how to activate it, well, I don’t really know how either. After all, this Spatial Teleportation Stone is extremely rare even in the ancient times.”

Zhou Weiqing quickly looked over at Shangguan Xue’er, “Have you heard of this stone?” The richest place in the mainland was the Heaven’s Expanse Palace. There were many treasured collections in the palace. Perhaps the Spatial Teleportation Stone might be amongst them.

Unfortunately, she shook her head, “I’ve never even heard of such thing before. But, if it really exists in this world, I’m sure that we’ll be able to find it.”

Zhou Weiqing turned and looked at Hui Yao. If it was not for the Netherworld, he would do his best to persuade the pair of dragons to not destroy the Luster Spatial Realm. But now, the matter was a lot more serious than he had originally thought. The presence of the Netherworld not only threatened Zhongtian City, but the entire human population as well. How could he possibly stop them from going out?

At this moment, Little Fatty Zhou’s vigor came back again. After a short while of mulling it over, he looked at Hui Yao as he said in a deep voice, “Sir, how about this? We prepare ourselves for both eventualities. Give us three years and we’ll use this three years to search for the Spatial Teleportation Stone. At the same time, we’ll slowly relocate Zhongtian City’s civilians to another safe place. If we’re not able to find the stone in three years time, you can leave the Luster Spatial Realm. That will give us enough time to move all the inhabitants away. But of course, finding the stone would be the ideal solution. And at that time, I give you my words that I WILL open a passage for you and send you out from here.”

It was the most plausible idea so far. Hui Yao nodded his head, the gaze that was trained on Zhou Weiqing had a tint of appreciation, “You’re a clever human. Let’s do as you say. I’ll give you three years.”

Zhou Weiqing nodded his head, “Thank you, sir. In that case, we shouldn’t waste anymore time. We’ll take our leave now and help you search for the stone.”

Hui Yao suddenly exclaimed, “Wait a minute! Before you leave, please absorb more of my Heavenly Energy. Otherwise, I can’t guarantee I can hold back the urge to find my children.”

Zhou Weiqing was stunned. But, at this moment, Hui Yao already stretched out his claw towards him. Although he had a calm look on his face, Zhou Weiqing understood his intention clearly. Smiling, he replied, “Thank you, I’ll take it then.”

…

Heavenly Jewel Island, Heaven’s Expanse Palace

Shangguan Tianyang and Tianyue were standing in front of the activated the formation of the Luster Spatial Realm with bitter looks on their faces.

Six months! Since the day Zhou Weiqing and the girls entered the Luster Spatial Realm, six months had passed! There were still no signs of life in the Luster Spatial Realm. The occasional energy ripples were no longer as intense as before.

Although the Luster Spatial Realm was obviously more important than Zhou Weiqing and the four girls, the three Shangguan sisters were their only successors for f*ck sake! If all of them died inside the Luster Spatial Realm, it would spell disaster for the Heaven’s Expanse Palace. Even worse, Zhou Weiqing and the daughter of the Heavenly Snow Mountain Lord were in there as well! Before this, somebody from the Wan Shou Empire had entered the Luster Spatial Realm and all of them had retreated due to the terrifying force inside. Those people had already returned to the Wan Shou Empire and they even spread the news that Tian’er was inside. If they really died in the Luster Spatial Realm, Long Shiya the Six Ultimate Heavenly Emperor and Xue Aotian, the Heavenly Snow Mountain Lord would definitely come demanding an explanation. Even though the Heaven’s Expanse Palace was strong, it would never be able to fight against the both of them.

Frowning, Shangguan Tianyue said, “Brother, I think it’s better if we send somebody to have a look! There’s no movement at all after so long. We need to get the bodies back if they’re really dead!”

Shangguan Tianyang sighed out loud, “Brother, it’s all my fault! I shouldn’t have let them enter the realm in the first place.”

Tianyue’s eyes had a worried look as he shook his head, “It’s no use saying all these now. What’s done, is done. All we can do now is to pray for those children. Brother, I…” As he uttered those words, tears began to well up in Tianyue’s— who was a freaking Heavenly Emperor Level master— eyes.

Tianyang did not know how to comfort him.

Without warning, a powerful ripple suddenly fluctuated in the Luster Spatial Realm. Both the brothers quickly looked over at the golden screen.

In a flash, five shadows appeared soundlessly out of thin air. Another shimmer flashed past and in just a blink of an eye, five people were already standing in front of them.

Zhou Weiqing was standing at the front with a smile on his face. However, there was something different about his temperament. The instance he appeared, even Tianyang and Tianyue who had a high cultivation base could feel an obvious crushing presence from his body. They were both completely taken aback by it. It looked like he must have had a fortuitous meeting inside the realm.

Their gaze moved to the three Shangguan sisters who were standing behind Zhou Weiqing. Seeing that they were all safe and unharmed, Tianyue was so happy that he almost shed tears in front of them. He immediately went to the three sisters and spread his arms wide before pulling them into his warm embrace.

“FINALLY! You three are finally out! You really gave me a huge fright, you know!”

The worries and solemnity in Tianyang’s eyes vanished instantly. Chuckling, he looked over at Zhou Weiqing, “You brat! You’re really one lucky bastard! Looks like you’ve got quite a harvest this time!”

Zhou Weiqing chortled, “This time, we managed to solve a huge problem for the Heaven’s Expanse Palace. Just take it as the bride-price for Xue’er, Fei’er and Bing’er, okay?”

Tianyang laughed out loud, “What a sly boy! You just don’t want to pay that one billion gold, huh? Alright then! As long as the Luster Spatial Realm’s problem is resolved for good, I’ll let you go this time.”

Zhou Weiqing smiled awkwardly, “… Actually, it’s not completely resolved,” Although they just came out of Luster Spatial Realm, the matter was too important so he did not dare to drag it out a second longer. At once, he spilled all the details about the situation in the Luster Spatial Realm to Tianyang.
