The materials for making God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scrolls were too valuable, and the probability of failure increased greatly if they did not draw the design first. None of the excellent God Tier Masters would do such a stupid thing. However, the young man in front of them did exactly that.

Zhou Weiqing flicked his right wrist. The wielded Consolidating Brush descended on the Consolidated Equipment Paper. The silver Consolidating Ink immediately produced the outlines. His actions were slow, but his wrist was extremely firm. His emotions seemed to disappear momentarily. It was as though he, the Consolidating Brush, and the Consolidated Equipment Paper were a single entity.

‘He is mad. He must be crazy!’ The two God Tier Masters looked at each other. They were utterly shocked by Zhou Weiqing.

Thick and silvery radiance continuously surged out from Zhou Weiqing. This was the Heavenly Energy that had been transformed into the Spatial Attribute. The silver radiance went down his arm to the Consolidating Brush in his hand before gathering at the tip of as he slowly drew.

At this moment, the yellow rosewood table and the legendary Consolidating Brush in Zhou Weiqing’s hand played a critical role. The Consolidated Equipment Paper lay stably on the yellow rosewood table. When the Consolidating Ink was used to draw the outline on the Consolidated Equipment Paper, the Consolidating Ink would integrate into the Consolidated Equipment Paper in the fastest possible time. The regular movements of the Consolidating Brush in Zhou Weiqing’s hand did not waver at all during the entire process as though it had found its own trajectory.

chapters.title: Chapter 696
chapters.body:
Chapter 696

‘To avoid revealing the design, he decided to do it in this manner. He will surely fail.’ The two God Tier Masters had the same thoughts. However, would Zhou Weiqing really fail?

The answer was a definite yes.

Before the consolidating brush in Zhou Weiqing’s hands had twisted twice and before he even completed the first stroke, deviations had appeared.

As mentioned previously, any mistakes even as fine as hairs would cause the entire thing to fail. Besides, the God Tier Master Level Consolidated Equipment Scroll that was being made by Zhou Weiqing used strokes that were finer than strands of hair. The entire scroll needed thousands of these brush strokes to be completed.

‘Failed. And so quickly too. I knew that he couldn’t be a God Tier Master.’ The two widened their eyes at the same time. They did not know why but they both felt relief in their hearts. Perhaps subconsciously, they did not want to believe that a 25-year-old with only a Five Jewels cultivation base could be a genius at the God Tier Master level.

However, they only managed to heave half a sigh of relief before their bodies tensed up again.

At the moment Zhou Weiqing made the mistake, a strange scene unfolded in front of their eyes. A strange insect-like shadow appeared behind him. Strange energy emanated from it, causing everything in the room to be warped.

What was even stranger was that, following the emergence of the large transparent insect and the distortion, Zhou Weiqing’s body started emitting a silvery-white light immediately after.

Everything wound back to a few moments ago. Although it only returned by a few seconds in time, it went back to the time before Zhou Weiqing made the mistake.

The old man could no longer stay calm or constrict his own aura. He stood up in shock as he blurted out, “The Time Attribute!”

Next to him, the woman was completely dumbfounded.

With their cultivation base, how could they not see what Zhou Weiqing had done? Only the Time Attribute could have such an effect! Although they did not know what technique Zhou Weiqing had used, he had clearly used a technique to turn back time. He rewound time back to just before he made a mistake with his Consolidating Brush before continuing from there.

‘It can even be done this way’

At this moment, the two God Tier Masters realized that their understanding of the creation of Consolidated Equipment Scrolls had been completely subverted.

It was not just them. Even Shangguan Bing’er who came with Zhou Weiqing was equally shocked.

When Shangguan Bing’er first arrived, she was very nervous because she knew Zhou Weiqing best. She knew that he had never made a Consolidated Equipment Scroll before, so how could it be possible for him to be a God Tier Master? After arriving, although she was not able to judge the strength of the two God Tier Masters, she could sense that their cultivation base was much higher than hers and Zhou Weiqing’s. Under such circumstances, if Zhou Weiqing was unable to pass the test, it would be difficult for them to leave this place, let alone obtain the Spatial Teleportation Stone.

Had it not been because of Zhou Weiqing’s constant reassurance that he could pass the test, she would never have agreed to him coming here.

However, over time, Shangguang Bing’er became increasingly shocked with Zhou Weiqing’s performance. She was not surprised about the Unity of Heaven And Man because she knew the secret behind. However, when Zhou Weiqing started preparing the Consolidating Ink, she realized her understanding of this little fatty was really far off.

At that moment, Zhou Weiqing was extremely focused. Although he was not particularly handsome, in the eyes of women, men that were completely focused on what they were doing were the most handsome.

When Shangguan Bing’er witnessed that scene earlier, she finally understood why Zhou Weiqing said he could make God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scrolls. It looked like Zhou Weiqing’s trump card was the Time Attribute. However, Shangguan Bing’er knew that Zhou Weiqing was actually relying on the Saint Energy.

On their way to the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland, Shangguan Bing’er had naturally gotten a grasp of Zhou Weiqing’s abilities. She thought to herself, ‘Did Zhou Weiqing just use the highest leveled skill from the Time Attribute, Time Reversal?’

This skill had once saved Shangguan Fei’er’s life so Shangguan Bing’er remembered it clearly. In normal circumstances, Time Reversal would bring the user back one hour in time. With some difficulty, the user could control the time better or return back slightly further in time. Furthermore, after using Time Reversal, the user would not be able to control the flow of the reversed time, nor could they alter what followed after reversing time.

However, Zhou Weiqing had done just that. Undoubtedly, it was because Zhou Weiqing had used the Saint Energy to cast Time Reversal. The originally useless God Tier skill had now evolved into something that defied natural order.

Zhou Weiqing was not a God Tier Master, but with his Time Reversal skill, he could slowly make a God Tier Master Level Consolidated Equipment Scroll. So what if he made a mistake? If he made a mistake, he could just go back in time and attempt it again and again. As long as there was some improvement each time, it would eventually be completed.

As for the consumption of Saint Energy, Zhou Weiqing only needed a miniscule bit to maintain the Time Reversal. With his cultivation base, he could keep it up even if he only had Five Jewels instead of Nine.

‘Little Fatty. You are really too smart.’ At this moment, Shangguan Bing’er eyes were full of admiration. Her Little Fatty was too smart. Obviously, he had already planned for all this when he claimed to be a God Tier Master.

While Zhou Weiqing continued on, the two God Tier Masters were stupefied. They obviously felt that Zhou Weiqing’s actions were shameless. However, he had the Time Attribute!

‘What is this? This is an innate gift. This is definitely a heavenly talent!’ they thought to themselves.

Zhou Weiqing had utilized the Wind, Space, and Time Attributes. With those three Great Attributes combined, it meant that the most powerful and gifted God Tier Master was born.

Zhou Weiqing first came into contact with the Consolidated Equipment Scroll through Huyan Aobo. When the man found out that Zhou Weiqing had gathered those three Attributes, he was pleasantly surprised.

Huyan Aobo might have been pleasantly surprised, but the two God Tier Masters from the Mysterious Heavenly Palace felt nothing but pure shock at the discovery.

Most importantly, they were unable to recognize the Time Reversal that Zhou Weiqing had demonstrated. Even if they recognized it, they would not consider it as being the same Time Reversal.

In this set time that Zhou Weiqing turned back time, he was in full control of it. If the skill was used in the midst of a battle, the results would be terrifying.

What they didn’t know was that for this absolute control over time, even with Saint Energy, the most Zhou Weiqing could only rewind time was by five seconds. Additionally as Shangguan Bing’er thought, it did not require a lot of Saint Energy. However the consumption of Spiritual Energy was significant and had been out of Zhou Weiqing’s expectations as well.

Fortunately, Zhou Weiqing was not really a Five Jewel Master but a Nine Jewel Master. His Spiritual Energy was also far above the reserves of an ordinary person. Under these circumstances, Zhou Weiqing could still continue crafting the Consolidated Equipment Scroll.

As time passed, sweat began to form on Zhou Weiqing’s head, but the sweat was unable to drip onto the Consolidating Paper. There was already a layer of spatial vibration above the Consolidating Paper. Anything that fell on it would be bounced away.

Line after line, stroke after stroke, Zhou Weiqing continued drawing. It was the first time Zhou Weiqing had been so serious and persistent in making a Consolidated Equipment Scroll. What he was making was the Ringless Ground Purging Set that he was most familiar with. Moreover, it was the set he needed the most, the seventh set.

His cultivation base had already reached Nine Jewels. However, he only had five Ringless Ground Purging Sets. Including the Overlord Bow, he would only have six Consolidated Equipment sets. If he had one more Ringless Ground Purging Set, it meant his cultivation base could continue to surge and his strength would be doubled.

Once his power doubled up again, Zhou Weiqing felt he would be able to face a strong Heavenly King Stage enemy, perhaps even an enemy at the maximum level of the Heavenly King Stage.

As for the Heavenly Emperor Stage, he had not thought about it, nor did he wish to try…

Time continued to pass by. When Zhou Weiqing initially arrived, it was still morning. Currently, the sky had turned dark.

Zhou Weiqing’s rosy face had turned a little paler, but the determination in his eyes never wavered.

At this moment, the scroll-making process had already arrived at the final stage. The Saint Energy in Zhou Weiqing’s body continued to revolve without being consumed much. Even though not much was consumed, he felt like his Soul Energy was being depleted. The consumption of Spiritual Energy was giving him a splitting headache. If he had not been tested over 10 times by the Immortal Deity Technique, his willpower would not have been strong enough for him to last this long.

The process of creating a God Tier Master Level Consolidated Scroll could be paused, but it must never be interrupted. Otherwise, all of the efforts would be in vain. This was also one of the reasons why making a God Tier Master Level Consolidated Scroll required the strength of a Heavenly King Master.

chapters.title: Chapter 697
chapters.body:
Chapter 697

A Heavenly King Tier powerhouse was not just someone whose heavenly cultivation base had reached an extremely terrifying level. Similarly, the Spiritual and Soul Energy of the Heavenly King Tier powerhouses must have already reached a level that enables them to make Consolidated Equipment Scrolls.

Even then, the body of a God Tier Master would generally not be very strong as the Spiritual Energy and Soul Energy consumption during the production of God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scrolls was too high.

The Consolidated Equipment Scroll that Zhou Weiqing was making could be considered good. After all, it was his sixth Ringless Ground Purging Set. If it was the final few pieces, for example, the tenth Consolidated Equipment Scroll, the Spiritual Energy and Soul Energy consumption rate would be horrifying. This was also why Duan Tianlang taught Zhou Weiqing a lot of things. He was not sure about how much longer he could survive after helping Zhou Weiqing obtain the tenth Ringless Ground Purging Set.

Zhou Weiqing initially did not know this. However, now that he was making the God Tier Consolidating Equipment Scroll, he gradually understood Duan Tianlang’s intentions.

‘Is this just a big sham?!

‘Will he succeed? Will he?!’ the God Tier Masters thought. At this time, the two God Tier Masters sat facing each other. Their expressions were no better than Zhou Weiqing’s condition. They had also expanded quite a large amount of Spiritual Energy. They tried to memorize each and every stroke made by the Consolidating Brush in Zhou Weiqing’s hand. However, Zhou Weiqing often used Time Reversal to repeat the steps, making it harder for them to remember the strokes.

Naturally, they could also see that Zhou Weiqing was almost done with the Consolidated Equipment Scroll.

A faint light flashed. Zhou Weiqing’s expression turned even more solemn. He knew that his Spiritual Energy could run out at anytime. However, faced with such a situation, the proud Zhou Weiqing became even more defiant and determined. He clenched his teeth and decided to persevere until the end.

This was not only to complete the God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll but also to test his own willpower. If he could do it, it would be beneficial towards his cultivation in the future. He also believed that if he succeeded in making the God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll, he would be able to get his Saint Energy to break through to the 37th tier.

With such temptation in front of him, how could he give up? If he were to give this opportunity up, no one knew when his Saint Energy breakthrough would take place in the future. Having reached the 36th tier, the following tiers could not be so easily broken through by just effort and hard work. Luck and opportunity were equally important. This current opportunity was a rare chance!

The sky outside gradually turned dark. However, the other three people in the room did not bother lighting any candles because they feared that any small movement would cause Zhou Weiqing to fail.

A faint light flashed again. Zhou Weiqing’s face was dripping with sweat. Only a little bit of the Consolidating Ink was left in the crystal vat.

‘It is time for the final part.’ Zhou Weiqing’s pupils constricted to the size of a needle point. The Consolidating Brush in his hands started to tremble for the first time since he started.

At that moment, the atmosphere in the entire cottage became heavy. It felt as though the air itself had solidified. Even Shangguan Bing’er’s fists were tightly clenched.

‘Hm… Failed.’ the God Tier Master thought.

At the moment when Zhou Weiqing’s was making his final stroke, the Consolidating Paper suddenly tore. He cast Time Reversal again. However, this time, Zhou Weiqing was trembling. The burden on his Spiritual Energy was so extreme that even his strong body could not take the strain. Blood flowed out of his nose, mouth, and ears. The blood snaked its way down his face, giving him a frightening appearance.

‘I must succeed!’ Zhou Weiqing shouted in his heart. In a flash, his right hand turned silverish white in color and his trembling hands became stable.

He no longer cared about other matters in his effort to complete the God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll. He had to complete it even if he risked exposing the profound mysteries of Saint Energy. Otherwise, if he failed, it might cause the cultivation progress of his Saint Energy to be stunted.

Zhou Weiqing was very confident before he started making the God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll. With Time Reversal and the Ninth Jewel cultivation, he believed that he was not inferior to any of the Heavenly King Tier Masters. In reality, after he tried making it himself, he understood how difficult it was to make a God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll. If he did not have Time Reversal, he would have failed at least a hundred times already. However, an ordinary God Tier Master would need to complete it without making a single mistake.

It could be said that there was still an insurmountable moat between Zhou Weiqing and a real God Tier Master. However, with Time Reversal, he had forcefully defied natural order.

At this time, the two God Tier Masters did not notice the changes in Zhou Weiqing’s Heavenly Energy. Their eyes were on the almost completed scroll that kept going back in time.

The last stroke that a God Tier Master made was usually the one that would bring the most enlightenment. They were no exception. The aura emitted by the silvery-white light and Saint Energy from Zhou Weiqing’s hands felt as if it originated from the essence of the world. Both of them chose to ignore it. After all, it had nothing to do with them. On top of that, Zhou Weiqing had already showed them too many miracles. They thought Saint Energy was simply one of the secret techniques of the Strength Legacy.

The gleaming light continued drawing, and the silvery material continued etching. Zhou Weiqing’s Consolidating Brush started drawing again. At this point in time, the blood from his face was still dripping profusely. It caused him to look even more terrifying than before.

Suddenly, the bright and silvery light from the Consolidating Paper flared up. The thick silvery waves converged into a very strong ball of light. The blood dripping from Zhou Weiqing’s face instantly vaporized. Zhou Weiqing himself was also knocked back a few steps. He did not fall down thanks to Shangguan Bing’er’s support.

On the yellow rosewood table, the ball of silver light glowed brighter and brighter. The Atmospheric Energy in the air rushed into the scroll crazily as though it had come to life.

A Consolidated Equipment Scroll of any level would absorb Atmospheric Energy upon completion. The only difference was the amount it absorbed. A Mid and High Level Consolidated Equipment Scroll only absorbed a very small amount. A Heavenly Jewel Master would not even be able to detect it. The difference in absorption rate would become more obvious at the Grandmaster tier. As for God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scrolls, the absorption of Atmospheric Energy could only be described as terrifying. If it had to be quantified, it would absorb the Atmospheric Energy equal to the Nucleus Core of a Heavenly King Tier.

That is why a God Tier Master would choose a place with plenty of Atmospheric Energy to make a scroll. This was also one important reason why the Heaven’s Expanse Palace was able to win over the Three God Tier Masters. On the Boundless Mainland, there were not many places that could compare with the Heaven’s Expanse Palace when it came to the density of Atmospheric Energy. Naturally, it was also possible to do it at the Heavenly Snow Mountain. However, compared to the Heaven’s Expanse Palace, the people there were of a different race, and there was also a slight difference in Atmospheric Energy.

There was no doubt that this place here was rich in Atmospheric Energy. When Zhou Weiqing had finished the production of the scroll, he could clearly feel a large amount of Atmospheric Energy pouring in from every direction into the cottage that was sitting in the middle of the valley. The place was extremely rich in Atmospheric Energy.

Although Zhou Weiqing did not know what caused this phenomenon, it was clear that the abundance of Atmospheric Energy in the area was something natural and not created by men.

The silver light turned pale gold before it became bright gold. Finally, it became a dark, thick golden color.

Suddenly, all the lights converged. It did not spread out. The turbulent Atmospheric Energy around the cottage also disappeared suddenly.

Everything became silent. On the other side of the table, the two God Tier Masters seemed to have collapsed from exhaustion. Their eyes were closed, and their chests heaved up and down. It was obvious that they were exhausted

Zhou Weiqing had a splitting headache. A dark golden scroll with a strange aura was floating on the yellow rosewood table. He breathed a sigh of relief before he turned his head and fell into Shangguan Bing’er’s embrace.

In the entire history of God Tier Masters, a twenty year old God Tier Master had never existed before. It was even more impossible to find someone that could create a God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll the way Zhou Weiqing did. However, Zhou Weiqing had truly accomplished it.

Shangguan Bing’er supported the unconscious Zhou Weiqing and sat down at the side. Zhou Weiqing was still filled with Saint Energy so he could continue maintaining a Five Jewel Cultivation Base. She knew that her man was fine and only needed to rest because he had used up too much Spiritual Energy.

After half an incense time, the two God Tier Masters slowly opened their eyes. The first thing they saw was the scroll floating above the wooden table.

The woman slowly got up. She was extremely slender and taller than Shangguan Bing’er by half a head. She waved her right hand and the scroll flew towards her palm and unfolded itself.

She looked at the complicated and mysterious patterns on the scroll. Her beautiful eyes looked enthralled. The old man, standing by her side, also took a good look.

“This is truly a God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll. It is not a Pseudo God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll.” The old man easily evaluated the scroll after taking just a few glances at it.

The woman nodded and said, “He should not be called a genius. He should be called a strange genius, a monstrous talent, a peerless talent.” She lifted her head and looked at the unconscious Zhou Weiqing again.

At that moment, Zhou Weiqing’s bloodstained face had already been wiped clean by Shangguan Bing’er. He remained unconscious in Shangguan Bing’er’s embrace.

Shangguan Bing’er looked up at the two and asked suspiciously, “What is a Pseudo God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll?”

The woman froze. “Has he never told you?”

Shangguan Bing’er shook her head. “I’m not a Consolidating Master. Also, I would never want to trouble him.”

chapters.title: Chapter 698
chapters.body:
Chapter 698

The woman replied, “A Pseudo God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll is still a God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll. At first, we thought that regardless of how talented and excellent he is, he’ll only be able to make a pseudo scroll at best. Even then, his achievements in the future might surpass us as he is still young.”

Shangguan Bing’er gave an indifferent laugh. “Aren’t you just as young?”

For a moment, the woman was slightly taken aback. She then shook her head gently. A strange brilliance flashed in her eyes. “No. I’m different from him.”

“Pseudo scrolls usually only appear in the first few pieces of Legendary Sets. That’s the reason why a Zong Tier Consolidating Equipment Master has a chance at successfully creating such a scroll as well. Every Legendary Set has to be stronger than the previous one. If the first Legendary Set assembly component is a true God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll, then the number of assembly components needed for the following set will be greatly reduced. That’s why, in general, the first three or four scrolls are usually all Pseudo God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scrolls.”

Shangguan Bing’er suddenly said, “So, that’s it.”

The woman picked up the scroll made by Zhou Weiqing as she said, “I can see that this is also a part of a Legendary Set. Since it’s not a Pseudo God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll, this should be the sixth or the seventh piece of the Legendary Set. Seeing as he’s only at the Fifth Jewel cultivation base, there is a higher possibility of it being the sixth piece.”

If Zhou Weiqing was still awake, he would have been amazed by the woman’s conjecture and observations. Although she had guessed in the wrong direction, with the help of her observations, somehow she managed to guess correctly. This was really the sixth piece of the Ringless Ground Purging Set. He was also one step closer to understanding the Fifth Jewel cultivation base.

At this point, when both the woman and the old man looked at Zhou Weiqing, their expressions had completely changed. Shangguan Bing’er could see a hint of respect in their eyes. It was the kind of respect that was usually reserved for powerhouses.

“Please take him to the next room to rest. Everything else can wait until he wakes up,” the woman said as she walked to Shangguan Bing’er and handed the sixth Ringless Ground Purging Set to her.

Shangguan Bing’er looked surprised. “You don’t want it? It’s made from the materials that you provided after all.”

The woman smiled a little. Her majestic aura and dignified manner made Shangguan Bing’er feel inferior. Shangguan Bing’er definitely did not lose out in terms of appearance. What she lacked was self-confidence. The woman carried herself with poise and had the air of absolute self-confidence. Even in the face of Zhou Weiqing’s astounding talent, her confidence in herself had not decreased one bit.

“There’s no need for the Mysterious Heavenly Palace to be so stingy. You can consider those materials as a gift from us to Master Zhou for our first meeting.”

Shangguan Bing’er nodded. Naturally, she did not hesitate as she accepted the scroll. It was also at this moment that Shangguan Bing’er noticed the woman had begun to see Zhou Weiqing in a different light.

“I’ll have to trouble you to tell him when he wakes up. My name is Meng Xing. People call me Master Meng Xing. This here is Master Nie Han.” After that, she turned around and walked out of the cottage as the old man followed suit.

“Meng Xing?” Shangguan Bing’er repeated her name. It was evident that the female God Tier Master was using an alias.

The cottage next door was equally as simple. It had a table, two chairs, and a wooden bed that was not too wide. However, if one were to take a closer look, they would find that the furniture was all made from yellow rosewood and there was a faint fragrance of yellow rosewood throughout the room.

Shangguan Bing’er carefully placed Zhou Weiqing on the wooden bed. Before she even had the time to properly sit, a powerful hand was placed on her delicate body as it pulled her into a warm embrace.

“You’re awake?” Shangguan Bing’er was surprised.

Zhou Weiqing did not open his eyes. He softly said to Shangguan Bing’er as he embraced her soft and lovely body. “I wouldn’t dare to sleep too long in a place like this. What’s the situation like?”

Shangguan Bing’er replied, “You’ve passed the test. The scroll has also been given to us.”

Zhou Weiqing then said, “That’s good. I’m going to rest for a while.” Out of fear that he might be in danger, Zhou Weiqing had forced himself awake despite his splitting headache. After he had confirmed their safety, he felt relieved and quickly fell asleep.

The consumption of Spiritual Energy this time was really too great. However, it had been beneficial to Zhou Weiqing. There was a smile on his face even as he slept. The fact that he had been stuck at a bottleneck in his Saint Energy cultivation had been haunting him for months. However, he had broken through to the next tier the instant he completed the God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll.

Due to Zhou Weiqing’s complete control, the other three people in the cottage did not notice anything amiss. The truth was there had been an earth-shaking change in Zhou Weiqing’s body.

The originally dense silvery-white Saint Energy was revolving at his 36th Death Acupuncture Point. Then, unexpectedly, the process of filtering and compressing started; his body had also been tempered by the process.

Zhou Weiqing did not need to personally oversee the process. Everything was done by the Saint Energy. Breaking through the bottleneck was like entering another realm. After talking to Shangguan Bing’er and falling asleep, he could clearly feel a brand new thread of Saint Energy appearing in his Heavenly Core Nucleus.

After the breakthrough, the Saint Energy had completely turned into a clear silver color. The color was similar to the silver color that flashed for a split second the moment the God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll was completed.

It was transparent with bits of glimmering silver light. This new silver color had replaced the originally silvery white. The compressing and filtering were not irritating. On the contrary, it was quite comfortable. It circulated gently in his Heavenly Core Nucleus, giving off a warm and comfortable feeling.

The process of conversion continued. At times like that, sleeping was obviously the best option for Zhou Weiqing. The Saint Energy’s self-protection made it such that Zhou Weiqing did not need to worry about his body’s problems.

The Saint Energy in Zhou Weiqing’s body constantly circulated and transformed. The newly filtered and condensed silvery liquid Saint Energy appeared at Zhou Weiqing’s Heavenly Core Nucleus and brain. Shangguan Bing’er, who was being embraced by Zhou Weiqing, did not feel the changes in his body. However, the Saint Energy in her own body was affected. Unexpectedly, it started circulating. This was the first time Shangguan Bing’er had encountered such a situation after obtaining Saint Energy. However, the speed of circulation was a little slow. After all, she did not have the Saint Attribute, and she lacked the key to guide the Saint Energy. However, at that moment, with Zhou Weiqing by her side, and with the higher level Saint Energy within his body as the catalyst, it led Shangguan Bing’er’s Saint Energy along as it circulated

The speed at which it condensed and refined gave her a feeling as if she had made rapid progress.

‘It’s possible to cultivate while sleeping?’ Shangguan Bing’er found it rather funny. Unfortunately, she did not dare sleep. She was in a foreign land, and also in the headquarters of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. Now that Zhou Weiqing had fallen asleep, how could she not remain vigilant?

This time, Zhou Weiqing slept for three whole days.

During this period, there were people who sent them delicious food, fruits, and drinks. Shangguan Bing’er also did not need to take special care of Zhou Weiqing. She only needed to watch over him.

The God Tier Master Meng Xing and Nie Han visited twice. They were not surprised to see Zhou Weiqing in deep sleep. After all, even they felt weakened for some time after making a God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll, much less Zhou Weiqing’s method that used abilities which defied natural order.

It seemed like Zhou Weiqing and Shangguan Bing’er had managed to gain their full approval. They were very warm and cordial both times that they came to visit. A God Tier Master who could create a God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll with only a Fifth Jewel cultivation base. In that case, when he reached the Heavenly King Tier, it was possible that he would be able to create God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll with ease. This was not something the Mysterious Heavenly Palace could ignore.

On the third day, Shangguan Bing’er was pressed up against Zhou Weiqing as she felt a sudden circulation in her own Saint Energy being propelled by the movement of his Saint Energy. Suddenly, the speed of the Saint Energy’s movement circulated faster in her body before settling down again. A strange wave of energy was silently emitted by Zhou Weiqing’s body. She could only sense it because she also possessed the Saint Energy. In that short moment, she had also developed a special kind of understanding.

Zhou Weiqing slowly opened his eyes. He found that everything in front of him seemed clearer than before. He could even see the finest wooden grains on the ceiling.

The duration he slept was determined by the Saint Energy in his body. After sleeping for three days, his Saint Energy made a breakthrough from the 36th tier to the 37th tier.

Everything changed after reaching Nine Jewels. Even though it was just reaching a new tier, Zhou Weiqing had a completely new feeling.

The Saint Energy in his body had not transformed completely, but it had brought enough surprises for him.

All of his 36 Death Acupuncture Points had a silverish, galaxy-like Saint Energy sphere. It was like a core. The rest of the Saint Energy revolved around it, making it more consolidated.

Regardless of whether it was this silvery light or that silvery white light that came from within the body, all the Saint Energy had completely turned into viscous liquid. However, the circulating speed had doubled. Just a thought was enough to make the Saint Energy in his body circulate on its own.

What was even more amazing was Zhou Weiqing’s perception. He could clearly feel that his Spiritual Energy had greatly improved. Due to the Saint Energy in his body, he could clearly feel the fluctuations of the Atmospheric Energy in a one thousand meter radius.

The valley seemed to be a naturally formed canyon that was filled with Atmospheric Energy. Naturally, it had an overwhelming force in the outside world. As long as there was a slight fluctuation in the Atmospheric Energy, the entire valley would absorb the Atmospheric Energy from the outside world.

When Zhou Weiqing realized this, he felt like he had fused with the Atmospheric Energy. He could control and manipulate the Atmospheric Energy as long as he could sense it. The Saint Energy in his body did not need him to move. It would circulate and cultivate on its own. On top of that, the cultivation process was the expansion of the silvery mass at the 38th Death Acupuncture Point.

chapters.title: Chapter 699
chapters.body:
Chapter 699

Heavenly Dao Energy! Zhou Weiqing suddenly came to a realization. When his Heavenly Energy broke through to the 36th-tier, he had remained at the Heavenly Xu Energy level. However, this breakthrough brought him to the realm of Heavenly Dao Energy, or to be exact, Saint Dao Energy.

A Saint Core Nucleus could be condensed only when four types of Saint Dao Energy were accumulated, similar to how Heavenly Dao Energy was condensed into a Heavenly Core Nucleus. Even though he had yet to achieve the Heavenly King Tier, by crossing over into the Saint Dao Energy stage, he had already exceeded most of the Higher Level Heavenly Zong masters. It was unknown how many of the Higher Level Heavenly Zong masters were suppressed by the 36 levels of Zong Heavenly Energy. Entering the Heavenly Dao Energy stage meant that there was a significantly higher possibility of him forming a nucleus.

This was a critical step. To any Heavenly Jewel Master, it was a very thrilling move filled with opportunity.

As Zhou Weiqing had always been cultivating the Immortal Deity Technique, he achieved breakthroughs rapidly. As a result, the bottleneck only plagued him for several months. However, if this was known by the Higher Level Heavenly Zong masters, they would spit blood on his face. This was because they might not necessarily be able to cross that threshold even after decades of arduous cultivation!

Heavenly Dao Energy meant controlling the energies of the Heavenly Dao. It was endless as it fused with the Heavenly Dao. This single evolution took him to a completely different level. Only at this point had the Saint Energy in him truly completed a circulation. With the Saint Energy, Zhou Weiqing was absolutely confident that he would have a fighting chance if he faced any powerhouses below the Heavenly Emperor Tier. Even a Heavenly Emperor Tier expert would have difficulty killing him.

“Little Fatty, are you alright?” Shangguan Bing’er asked with concern. Although she had constantly sensed Zhou Weiqing’s Saint Energy increasing, he did become unconscious because he had used too much Spiritual Energy.

Zhou Weiqing slowly stretched out his right hand, clenched his fist, and felt the Atmospheric Energy compressing. “The Heavenly Dao Energy. Bing’er, I’ve made a breakthrough.”

Shangguan Bing’er was slightly dazed. She could not help it as her eyes gave off a twinkle. She had already known many years ago that her little fatty was abnormally talented. Although she knew that he would become a powerhouse in the future, she never expected it to happen so fast.

Since the beginning of Zhou Weiqing’s cultivation, only six to seven years had passed, but his cultivation was already steadily approaching the Heavenly King Tier. On top of that, it was the Heavenly King Tier with Saint Energy.

Zhou Weiqing turned to sit up and took a deep breath. Even as he took a breath, he could feel the Atmospheric Energy gushing wildly towards him. It was similar to what happened when he used Demonic Devour. If only he was not on the Mysterious Heavenly Palace’s territory… He really wished to experiment by using his Saint Energy to cast Demonic Devour. He wanted to see if he could swallow the Atmospheric Energy for cultivation with Demonic Devour’s aid. A powerful scene would surely unfold.

This breakthrough gave Zhou Weiqing an all-round improvement, be it his Saint Energy, Spiritual Energy, or in terms of physical prowess. All of them experienced significant improvements. In short, he was one foot into a brand new world.

“Did they say anything?” Zhou Weiqing asked Shangguan Bing’er.

Shangguan Bing’er shook her head.

Zhou Weiqing chuckled and replied, “It should be time for them to know that I’ve woken up, but first, let me consolidate the scroll.”

Five Ringless Ground Purging Sets could increase his power by thirty-two times his base. Six pieces would make the improvement sixty-four fold. As long as he consolidated the sixth Ringless Ground Purging Set that he had tried so very hard to make, the pure power alone was enough for Zhou Weiqing’s strength to soar.

The news of Zhou Weiqing waking up soon reached the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. However, nobody came to disturb him and Shangguan Bing’er that day. They came early the next morning, and Zhou Weiqing, who was cultivating in the wooden cabin, slowly opened his eyes.

“Coming.”

He put on his coat and got out of bed. He then left the wooden cabin with the neatly dressed Shangguan Bing’er.

Zhou Weiqing then stood calmly outside the wooden cabin. He did not move ahead to greet the visitors. There were not many people coming from outside the valley; there were only three people, and they were coming straight for the wooden cabin.

Among the trio, Zhou Weiqing only recognized one of them. This was the elder that had brought them to the Mysterious Heavenly Palace, Fei Lun. There was an old man beside him with a sun imprint on his chest. This showed that the man and Fei Lun’s had similar status. Leading them was a man with three suns on his chest.

The man was tall and slender, and he was covered in a blue robe. Long black hair flowed behind his back, and a large, dark blue mask covered his face. The man was covered completely. Not even the skin from around his neck could be seen.

‘Three sun imprints?’ Zhou Weiqing was slightly surprised.

The three soon arrived in front of the wooden cabin. The man in the lead stopped in his steps. His voice was very neutral and melodious. “Master Zhou. Greetings. It’s an honor that you’ve come to our Mysterious Heavenly Palace. I’m Dongfang, the lord of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace.”

Zhou Weiqing thought to himself, ‘As expected!’

He laughed, stepped forward, nodded his head and replied, “Greetings, Palace Master Dongfang.” Elder Fei Lun did not raise any objections to Zhou Weiqing’s lack of decorum. Back when Zhou Weiqing proved that he was a God Tier Master, he gained the right to be arrogant.

Zhou Weiqing carefully perceived the Palace Master. However, he realized that his perception was vanishing as though it was sinking into the ocean. It did not give him any useful information. However, he felt that the Palace Master was giving off an extremely heavy and profound aura. Zhou Weiqing could clearly feel the connection between himself and the Atmospheric Energy weakening greatly by him simply standing there.

Dongfang said indifferently, “Master Zhou, I’m truly astounded that you are already capable of making God Tier Consolidating Equipment Scrolls at such a young age. Nie Han and Meng Xing have already told me about your situation. We of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace fully welcome a talented Master like you. Please do state your requests if there are any. I’ll strive to fulfill them.”

Zhou Weiqing smiled and replied, “I wouldn’t call it a request. I joined the Mysterious Heavenly Palace for the purpose of being able to study Consolidating Equipment Scrolls better. Therefore, I must request that the Palace Master provide me with various materials. Also, I do not have the time to make Consolidating Equipment Scrolls for others. Those of insufficient rank should not come and bother me. On top of that, I hope to join the Mysterious Heavenly Palace as a guest as I do not wish for others to order me around. Of course, I won’t decline if the Palace Master needs my help.”

If anyone else had made such a request, the elder behind him would have already attacked without the need for the Palace Master to act. However, when these words were spoken by someone at the God Tier, it became a different matter.

The Palace Master nodded and said, “Naturally. Master Zhou, your request is approved. As long as my Mysterious Heavenly Palace can find the materials, you’re free to use them. However, I sincerely hope that a portion of Master Zhou’s finished products would be given to me for handling.”

Zhou Weiqing did not hesitate to lower his head. “As long as my wife and I do not need it, I will give it to you. However, I cannot guarantee the success rate. I hope you will not blame me for wasting materials when the time comes.”

The Palace Master laughed. “The Mysterious Heavenly Palace still has a level of confidence. Does Master Zhou have any other requests?”

Zhou Weiqing said, “I’m probably not like the other God Tier Masters. Perhaps it’s because I’m still too young but I prefer the bustle. Therefore, this quiet place is not too suitable for me. Palace Master, I hope you can find me a place to live in Mysterious Heavenly Palace.”

After listening to Zhou Weiqing, the faces of the two elders behind the Palace Master twitched. ‘What do you mean by too young? What a fleece! You’ve already become a God Tier Master around in your early twenties! How can we, the elders, endure this blow?’

The Palace Master nodded and said, “That is certainly possible.” He then looked at the two elders behind him and said in a heavy voice, “Pass my command down. From this moment forth, Master Zhou will be honored by our palace. His rank will be equivalent to that of a Supreme Elder. Master Zhou’s wife will also be given a position of an elder.”

“Yes.” The two elders replied in a respectful voice. Fei Lun took out a tray from his spatial storage ring and handed it to Zhou Weiqing. There were two sets of clothes on the tray.

The Palace Master once again nodded to Zhou Weiqing and said, “In order to welcome Master Zhou to the palace, I will host a grand welcoming ceremony this evening. When the time comes, important members of the palace will come and participate. It’s also the welcoming dinner for you. Master Zhou has been in seclusion for many years and may not be familiar with the situation in this Palace. Elder Fei Lun, you’re to stay behind and explain the palace’s situation to Master Zhou. I still have matters to tend to and will bid my farewell here.”

“Yes.” A glimmer of happiness flashed on Fei Lun’s face. He had the opportunity to be closer to someone at the God-Tier. This was a good thing.

The Palace Master turned and left with the other elder. Zhou Weiqing’s performance was perfect as he bowed slightly. Even though he did not follow decorum as expected for the Palace Master’s departure, Zhou Weiqing’s actions had already shown that he had been recognized as a member of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace.

At this time, Zhou Weiqing found it secretly amusing. He never expected that the Saint Lands he joined was on another continent.

Fei Lun no longer had the arrogance of when he first met Zhou Weiqing. He stood to the side and said with a smile, “Please do not be offended. This valley is the most secretive area of the palace. Without any orders from the Master, only two God Tier Masters are allowed to come and go freely. That’s why the Master only brought us both this time.”

Zhou Weiqing chuckled and replied, “I understand. The fact that the Palace Master came personally has already proven his sincerity. Elder, please come inside to have a seat. I have no inkling of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace, so I will have to trouble you.”

Fei Lun chuckled and said, “I thought that this might’ve been the case.”

chapters.title: Chapter 700
chapters.body:
Chapter 700

The three individuals returned to the wooden house and sat down in front of the yellow rosewood table. There were a few servants that were dedicated to attending to them. They were all women around the age of 40. One of them then served snacks and tea.

Fei Lun drank a mouthful of tea. He smiled and then said, “I’ll have to address you as Honorable in the future. For your introduction to the Mysterious Heavenly Palace, let us start with the staff. The supreme leader of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace is naturally His Excellency, the Palace Master. Under the Palace Master are the four Supreme Elders. They have equal status and two sun marks.”

Upon hearing up to this point, Zhou Weiqing interrupted. “What cultivation level are these elders at? The Heavenly Emperor Tier?”

It was easy to guess from Fei Lun’s Heavenly King Tier cultivation base that their cultivation base was likely higher than his for them to become Supreme Elders.

Fei Lun nodded and replied, “All the four Supreme Elders are Heavenly Emperor Tier powerhouses. They’re also the most powerful fighting force in this place. However, the four Supreme Elders no longer intervene in worldly affairs and rarely leave the Mysterious Heavenly Palace grounds.”

Zhou Weiqing asked curiously, “What about the Palace Master? Is he at the Heavenly God Tier?”

Fei Lun was taken aback, and after hesitating for a moment, he shook his head and said, “Nobody knows what cultivation level the Palace Master is at. All incumbent Palace Masters have a rule. They must wear masks. The next Palace Master is also being secretly trained by the current Palace Master. So, nobody knows what cultivation level the Palace Master is at.”

Zhou Weiqing asked skeptically, “If that’s the case, how do we know that the new Palace Master has enough strength to succeed the previous generation?”

Fei Lun replied, “That’s not that difficult. After the new Palace Master of the generation is selected, they would be secretly tested by the four Supreme Elders. The new Palace Master will only take over when he has achieved the sufficient cultivation base and be skilled in various aspects. Just between the both of us, I’m not sure if our Palace Master is at the Heavenly God Tier, but I’m certain he should at least be at the Heavenly Emperor Tier. Otherwise, how can he convince the Supreme Elders?”

Zhou Weiqing smiled and asked, “Since the position of Palace Master is passed down, is this also true for the Supreme Elders?”

Fei Lun shook his head and replied, “No. The Supreme Elders are determined by their strength. As long as they can attain the level of Heavenly Emperor Tier, they can become a Supreme Elder in the palace. This is also good as it gives others the motivation. I’ll continue. Below the four Supreme Elders, there are many more Elders also determined by their cultivation levels. The requirement to become an Elder is to be at the Heavenly King Tier. There are currently twelve Elders. They also form the strongest upper echelons of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. Besides us, there are also other branches in the city with designated responsibility. I have nothing much to say about their levels. Either way, all these people below you, a Lord God Tier Master, must obey your orders. Their specific grade is distinguished by moon and stars. The greater the number, the higher their level.”

The hierarchy of those in the Mysterious Heavenly Palace was extremely strict but easy to distinguish. They used the emblems on the chest for identification.

After that, Fei Lun gave Zhou Weiqing a brief introduction of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace’s current situation. Through Fei Lun’s introduction, Zhou Weiqing learned that the Mysterious Heavenly Palace’s headquarters was in this mountain range. The mountain range was a forbidden ground to outsiders. Even low-ranking members of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace were barred from entry.

The Mysterious Heavenly Palace usually did not involve itself with the Mysterious Heavenly Empire’s politics. However, the individual in charge of each Mysterious Heavenly Palace branch had a higher status compared to the local officials. This was also the reason why Er Chun was completely superior to Sang Tan who was the mayor of Ubaatar City.

There was nothing more to say about other matters. The Mysterious Heavenly Palace had an extremely lofty position on the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland. It could not be compared to any other faction. As such, they were people who could take whatever they want on the continent. This was one of the important reasons why the lower ranked members of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace were not heavily supervised.

“In that case, what do I usually need to do, Elder?” Zhou Weiqing asked Fei Lun after he was done with the introduction.

Fei Lun chuckled and said, “My Lord, your position is second only to the Palace Master. Apart from him, there is nobody who can request you to do anything. Even the Palace Master himself has to consider your suggestions. You can do whatever you want usually. We’ll get you whatever you ask for as long as it can be found on the continent. The subordinates will do it for you. Your freedom is unaffected as well. You can go wherever you like. You’ll only need to act if an extremely disastrous situation occurs to the palace. Of course, the possibility of that happening is close to zero.”

Zhou Weiqing chuckled. The treatment he was receiving as an Honorary Master, to say the least, was not bad at all. It looked as though his plan was very successful. Having such an extraordinary position in the Mysterious Heavenly Palace was a great advantage for him to find the Spatial Teleportation Stone.

Zhou Weiqing did not ask any more questions. He had just joined the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. It was obviously not a smart move to ask about the Spatial Teleportation Stone. He had to first settle down and gain the trust of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. Besides, with his current status, it was very likely that he might directly come across the Spatial Teleportation Stone.

After Fei Lun briefed Zhou Weiqing on the internal structure of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace, he did not overextend his stay. He left after vaguely implying that Zhou Weiqing could request him to do any errands.

Zhou Weiqing’s first step into the Mysterious Heavenly Palace could only be described as perfect. Not only did he manage to enter successfully, he even obtained such an esteemed position which increased his chances of getting close to the Spatial Teleportation Stone. On top of that, his status as a God Tier Master had been established. Perhaps, after gaining a little more trust from the Mysterious Heavenly Palace, he could directly request the Spatial Teleportation Stone for research. If the situation turned out like that, then it would be perfect.

After Fei Lun left, Zhou Weiqing did not take Shangguan Bing’er out for a walk. Instead, he continued staying in the cottage to cultivate and stabilize his recently elevated realm.

Shangguan Bing’er told Zhou Weiqing about the feeling she had in Zhou Weiqing’s arms when he was unconscious. The two attempted it again. As long as she cultivated within one meter of Zhou Weiqing, the Saint Energy in Shangguan Bing’er’s body would be driven along by Zhou Weiqing’s Saint Energy.

This way, Shangguan Bing’er’s body continued to improve during the Saint Energy circulation and the Atmospheric Energy absorption process. Her cultivation improved so quickly that even she herself was shocked. When she had met Zhou Weiqing again, she was only at the Sixth Jewel. However, she was now in the middle of the Seventh Jewel level. All this happened within the span of a few months. Although it could not be compared to when Zhou Weiqing absorbed the large Heavenly God Tier dragon, it was still shocking.

Zhou Weiqing made a bold guess. Perhaps once his Saint Energy condensed into a Nucleus Core, it would be possible to help the three Shangguan sisters who were filled with Saint Energy but had no Saint Attribute to condense Saint Core.

That evening, two attendants with a moon emblem on their chest came to invite them to a banquet. Only then did Zhou Weiqing and Shangguan Bing’er end their cultivation.

This time, they did not take the carriage. After they left the mountain valley, two attendants greeted Zhou Weiqing, who then led the way. Their speed was not too fast as they needed to take care of Zhou Weiqing who ‘only had five jewels.’

This time, Zhou Weiqing finally had a chance to look at the mountain range in its entirety. Because he was in the mountains, there were not much to see with naked eye. However, this did not mean that Zhou Weiqing could not see. With his upgraded sense of perception, he discovered that the undulating mountains were very vast. With his current perception, he could only feel the surrounding terrain but not the limits of the mountain range. The valley he was at was likely at the periphery of the mountain range.

They went down the mountain on the main road laid with granite. The road was surrounded by a variety of lush and green plants. Some were similar to the ones found on the Boundless Mainland, but there were also some that Zhou Weiqing and Shangguan Bing’er had never seen before.

Occasionally, there was a breeze blowing through the mountain. The rich fragrance of the plants wafted about in an especially refreshing manner. Compared to the Atmospheric Energy that would appear only after conjuration in the valley, the Atmospheric Energy was denser the further one went in.

Zhou Weiqing thought that this was the reason the Mysterious Heavenly Palace was so powerful. The Atmospheric Energy was no less dense than at the Heavenly Jewel Island. Furthermore, the difference between the Mysterious Heavenly Palace and the Heaven’s Expanse Palace was that the Mysterious Heavenly Palace could make full use of the resources on the mainland and even the ocean, as well as recruit all the talented people on the mainland. As such, if it was solely a conflict between Saint Lands, perhaps only the Heavenly Snow Mountain which controlled all beasts could match it. Even the Heaven’s Expanse Palace could not do so.

On the Heaven’s Expanse Mainland, although the ranking of the Heaven’s Expanse Palace was above the Heavenly Snow Mountain’s, it was only based on the rankings of the Heavenly Jewel Masters. It did not take into account the Heavenly Beasts the Heavenly Snow Mountain controlled. Naturally, the Heavenly Beasts would not leave the Ten Thousand Beast Heaven so easily. Otherwise, they would surely be slaughtered by the powerhouses in the entire continent. That was why when it came to overall strength, the Heavenly Snow Mountain was stronger. After all, Zhou Weiqing had already seen at least one Heavenly Beast at the Heavenly Emperor Tier in the Heavenly Snow Mountain. In comparison, the Shangguan brothers were the only two that were at the Heavenly Emperor Tier in the Heavenly Expanse Palace. One of the advantages the Heavenly Expanse Palace had was that they had a lot of experts, with dozens of Heavenly King Tier experts. It was a lot more than the Mysterious Heavenly Palace.

Therefore, Zhou Weiqing made a simple conclusion. The collective strength of the Heavenly Snow Mountain was likely enough to fight against the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. However, the chance of victory was not high. The Heavenly Expanse Palace needed to cooperate with at least two of the Five Great Saint Lands just to defeat the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. This had yet taken into consideration the lower-ranking Heavenly Jewel Masters of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. According to Zhou Weiqing’s estimate, the number of the Heavenly Jewel Masters controlled by the Mysterious Heavenly Palace was more than the total number of the Heavenly Expanse Palace and the Five Great Saint Lands put together. Although recruiting all sorts of people resulted in a motley crew, the Heavenly Expanse Palace and the Five Great Saint Lands cherished themselves too excessively. They did not recruit external disciples.
